title: Learning When to Remember: Risk-Sensitive Contextual Bandits for Abstention-Aware Memory Retrieval in LLM-Based Coding Agents
authors: Mehmet Iscan
abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based coding agents increasingly rely on external memory to reuse prior debugging experience, repair traces, and repository-local operational knowledge. However, retrieved memory is useful only when the current failure is genuinely compatible with a previous one; superficial similarity in stack traces, terminal errors, paths, or configuration symptoms can lead to unsafe memory injection. This paper reframes issue-memory use as a selective, risk-sensitive control problem rather than a pure top-k retrieval problem. We introduce RSCB-MC, a risk-sensitive contextual bandit memory controller that decides whether an agent should use no memory, inject the top resolution, summarize multiple candidates, perform high-precision or high-recall retrieval, abstain, or ask for feedback. The system stores reusable issue knowledge through a pattern-variant-episode schema and converts retrieval evidence into a fixed 16-feature contextual state capturing relevance, uncertainty, structural compatibility, feedback history, false-positive risk, latency, and token cost. Its reward design penalizes false-positive memory injection more strongly than missed reuse, making non-injection and abstention first-class safety actions. In deterministic smoke-scale artifacts, RSCB-MC obtains the strongest non-oracle offline replay success rate, 62.5%, while maintaining a 0.0% false-positive rate. In a bounded 200-case hot-path validation, it reaches 60.5% proxy success with 0.0% false positives and a 331.466 microseconds p95 decision latency. The results show that, for coding-agent memory, the key question is not only which memory is most similar, but whether any retrieved memory is safe enough to influence the debugging trajectory.
title_zh: 学会何时记忆：面向拒绝选择的上下文感知强化学习带偏见的检索机制在基于大语言模型的编程代理中的应用
abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型（LLM）的编码代理越来越多地依赖外部记忆，以复用以往的调试经验、修复轨迹及本地代码库中的操作知识。然而，检索到的记忆只有在当前失败与先前失败真正兼容时才具有实际价值；仅在堆栈跟踪、终端错误、路径或配置症状上存在表面相似性，就可能导致不安全的记忆注入。本文将问题-记忆使用重新定义为一种选择性、风险敏感的控制问题，而非单纯的 top-k 检索问题。我们提出了 RSCB-MC——一种风险敏感的上下文相关多臂赌博机记忆控制器，它决定代理应采取何种行为：不使用记忆、注入最优修复方案、汇总多个候选方案、执行高精度或高召回率检索、主动放弃决策，或请求反馈。该系统通过“模式-变体-事件”（pattern-variant-episode）架构存储可复用的问题知识，并将检索证据转化为一个包含16个特征的固定上下文状态，涵盖相关性、不确定性、结构兼容性、反馈历史、误报风险、延迟和令牌成本等维度。其奖励机制对误报式记忆注入施加比漏用重用更严厉的惩罚，使“不注入”和“主动放弃”成为首要的安全策略。在确定性的烟雾测试规模的实验中，RSCB-MC 达到了最强的非oracle离线回放成功率，为 62.5%，同时保持 0.0% 的误报率。在限定 200 个案例的热路径验证中，其代理成功率达到了 60.5%，误报率为 0.0%，p95 决策延迟仅为 331.466 微秒。结果表明，对于编码代理的记忆使用而言，关键问题不仅是“哪段记忆最相似”，更是“任何检索到的记忆是否足够安全，足以影响调试路径”。

title: Claw-Eval-Live: A Live Agent Benchmark for Evolving Real-World Workflows
authors: Chenxin Li, Zhengyang Tang, Huangxin Lin, Yunlong Lin, Shijue Huang, Shengyuan Liu, Bowen Ye, Rang Li, Lei Li, Benyou Wang, Yixuan Yuan
abstract: LLM agents are expected to complete end-to-end units of work across software tools, business services, and local workspaces. Yet many agent benchmarks freeze a curated task set at release time and grade mainly the final response, making it difficult to evaluate agents against evolving workflow demand or verify whether a task was executed. We introduce Claw-Eval-Live, a live benchmark for workflow agents that separates a refreshable signal layer, updated across releases from public workflow-demand signals, from a reproducible, time-stamped release snapshot. Each release is constructed from public workflow-demand signals, with ClawHub Top-500 skills used in the current release, and materialized as controlled tasks with fixed fixtures, services, workspaces, and graders. For grading, Claw-Eval-Live records execution traces, audit logs, service state, and post-run workspace artifacts, using deterministic checks when evidence is sufficient and structured LLM judging only for semantic dimensions. The release contains 105 tasks spanning controlled business services and local workspace repair, and evaluates 13 frontier models under a shared public pass rule. Experiments reveal that reliable workflow automation remains far from solved: the leading model passes only 66.7% of tasks and no model reaches 70%. Failures are structured by task family and execution surface, with HR, management, and multi-system business workflows as persistent bottlenecks and local workspace repair comparatively easier but unsaturated. Leaderboard rank alone is insufficient because models with similar pass rates can diverge in overall completion, and task-level discrimination concentrates in a middle band of tasks. Claw-Eval-Live suggests that workflow-agent evaluation should be grounded twice, in fresh external demand and in verifiable agent action.
title_zh: 爪子评估实时：面向不断演进的现实世界工作流的实时智能体基准
abstract_zh:
大语言模型（LLM）代理被期望能够跨软件工具、业务服务和本地工作空间完成端到端的工作单元。然而，目前许多代理评估基准在发布时即冻结一组精选任务，并主要依据最终响应进行评分，这使得难以评估代理对不断演进的工作流需求的适应能力，也难以验证任务是否真正被执行。为此，我们提出 Claw-Eval-Live——一个面向工作流代理的动态评估基准。该基准将可更新的信号层（基于公开的工作流需求信号，随版本迭代持续刷新）与可复现、带时间戳的发布快照层相分离。

每个版本均基于公开的工作流需求信号构建，采用当前版本中 ClawHub 排名前 500 的技能，并将其转化为具有固定环境配置（包括固定测试用例、服务、工作空间及评分器）的受控任务。在评分过程中，Claw-Eval-Live 会记录执行轨迹、审计日志、服务状态以及运行后的 workspace 资产，当证据充分时采用确定性检查，仅在语义维度上使用结构化 LLM 判断。

当前版本包含 105 个任务，涵盖受控业务服务与本地工作空间修复两大类，对 13 个前沿模型在统一的公开通过规则下进行评估。实验结果表明，可靠的流程自动化仍远未解决：表现最佳的模型仅能通过 66.7% 的任务，且没有任何模型达到 70% 的通过率。失败模式呈现出明显的任务类别与执行面分布特征，人力资源（HR）、管理类及多系统业务工作流始终是持续存在的瓶颈，而本地工作空间修复虽相对容易，但尚未达到饱和状态。

此外，排行榜排名本身不足以全面反映模型性能：即使通过率相近的模型，在整体完成度上也可能存在显著差异；而任务层面的区分度主要集中在中间难度的任务区间。Claw-Eval-Live 指出，工作流代理的评估应建立在双重“落地”基础之上：一是来自最新外部需求的真实信号，二是可验证的代理行为证据。

title: To Diff or Not to Diff? Structure-Aware and Adaptive Output Formats for Efficient LLM-based Code Editing
authors: Wei Cheng, Yongchang Cao, Chen Shen, Binhua Li, Jue Chen, Yongbin Li, Wei Hu
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used for code editing, yet the prevalent full-code generation paradigm suffers from severe efficiency bottlenecks, posing challenges for interactive coding assistants that demand low latency and cost. Despite the predominant focus on scaling model capabilities, the edit format itself has been largely overlooked in model training. In this paper, we begin with a systematic study of conventional diff formats and reveal that fragile offsets and fragmented hunks make generation highly unnatural for LLMs. To address it, we introduce BlockDiff and FuncDiff, two structure-aware diff formats that represent changes as block-level rewrites of syntactically coherent units such as control structures and functions. Furthermore, we propose AdaEdit, a general adaptive edit strategy that trains LLMs to dynamically choose the most token-efficient format between a given diff format and full code. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AdaEdit paired with structure-aware diff formats consistently matches the accuracy of full-code generation, while reducing both latency and cost by over 30% on long-code editing tasks.
title_zh: 是差异还是非差异？面向结构且自适应的输出格式在高效基于大语言模型的代码编辑中的应用
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在代码编辑中的应用日益广泛，然而当前主流的全代码生成范式存在严重的效率瓶颈，给需要低延迟和低成本的交互式编程助手带来了挑战。尽管模型能力的扩展一直是研究重点，但模型训练中对编辑格式本身的关注却长期被忽视。本文首先对传统的diff格式进行了系统性研究，发现脆弱的偏移量和碎片化的hunk（变更块）使得LLM生成过程极不自然。为解决这一问题，我们提出了BlockDiff和FuncDiff两种结构感知的diff格式，将代码修改表示为语法上连贯的单元（如控制结构、函数等）的块级重写。此外，我们提出AdaEdit，一种通用的自适应编辑策略，使LLM能够动态选择在给定diff格式与全代码之间最节省token的生成方式。大量实验表明，AdaEdit结合结构感知的diff格式，在长代码编辑任务中，不仅在准确性上始终与全代码生成相当，同时还将延迟和成本降低了30%以上。

title: Collaborative Agent Reasoning Engineering (CARE): A Three-Party Design Methodology for Systematically Engineering AI Agents with Subject Matter Experts, Developers, and Helper Agents
authors: Rahul Ramachandran, Nidhi Jha, Muthukumaran Ramasubramanian
abstract: We present Collaborative Agent Reasoning Engineering (CARE), a disciplined methodology for engineering Large Language Model (LLM) agents in scientific domains. Unlike ad-hoc trial-and-error approaches, CARE specifies behavior, grounding, tool orchestration, and verification through reusable artifacts and systematic, stage-gated phases. The methodology employs a three-party workflow involving Subject-Matter Experts (SMEs), developers, and LLM-based helper agents. These helper agents function as facilitation infrastructure, transforming informal domain intent into structured, reviewable specifications for human approval at defined gates. CARE addresses the "jagged technological frontier", characterized by uneven LLM performance, by bridging the gap between novice and expert analysts regarding domain constraints and verification practices. By generating concrete artifacts, including interaction requirements, reasoning policies, and evaluation criteria, CARE ensures agent behavior is specifiable, testable, and maintainable. Evaluation results from a scientific use case demonstrate that this stage-gated, artifact-driven methodology yields measurable improvements in development efficiency and complex-query performance.
title_zh: 协作智能体推理工程（CARE）：一种三方协同的设计方法，用于系统化地构建由领域专家、开发者和辅助智能体共同参与的AI智能体
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种名为协作智能体推理工程（Collaborative Agent Reasoning Engineering, CARE）的系统化方法，用于在科学领域中构建大型语言模型（LLM）智能体。与传统的随意试错方式不同，CARE通过可复用的成果物和系统化的、阶段式管控的流程，明确规范了智能体的行为、知识基础、工具调度以及验证机制。该方法采用三方协作工作流，涉及领域专家（SME）、开发者以及基于LLM的辅助智能体。这些辅助智能体作为协作基础设施，将非正式的领域意图转化为结构化、可审查的规格说明，并在预设的关键节点提交给人类进行审核。CARE有效应对了“技术前沿的不均衡性”问题——即LLM性能参差不齐，弥合了新手与专家分析师在领域约束理解与验证实践方面的差距。通过生成具体的成果物，如交互需求、推理策略和评估标准，CARE确保了智能体行为具备可定义性、可测试性和可维护性。在一项科学应用案例中的评估结果表明，这种分阶段、以成果物驱动的方法显著提升了开发效率，并增强了复杂查询的处理能力。

title: Design Structure Matrix Modularization with Large Language Models
authors: Shuo Jiang, Jianxi Luo
abstract: Design Structure Matrix (DSM) modularization, the task of partitioning system elements into cohesive modules, is a fundamental combinatorial challenge in engineering design. Traditional methods treat modularization as a pure graph optimization, without access to the engineering context embedded in the system. Building on prior work on LLM-based combinatorial optimization for DSM sequencing, this paper extends the method to modularization across five cases and three backbone LLMs. Our method achieves near-reference quality within 30 iterations without requiring specialized optimization code. Counterintuitively, domain knowledge, beneficial in sequencing, consistently impairs performance on more complex DSMs. We attribute this to semantic misalignment between the LLM's functional priors and the purely structural optimization objective, and propose the semantic-alignment hypothesis as a testable condition governing knowledge effectiveness with LLMs. Ablation studies identify the most effective input representation, objective formulation, and solution pool design for practical deployment. These findings offer practical guidance for deploying LLMs in engineering design optimization.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的结构矩阵模块化
abstract_zh: 设计结构矩阵（DSM）模块化，即把系统元素划分为紧密耦合的模块的任务，是工程设计中一个基本的组合优化挑战。传统方法将模块化视为纯粹的图优化问题，而无法利用系统中嵌入的工程背景信息。基于先前关于基于大语言模型（LLM）的DSM排序组合优化的研究，本文将该方法扩展至五个案例和三种骨干LLM的模块化应用。我们的方法在30次迭代内即可达到接近参考水平的性能，且无需专门的优化代码。出人意料的是，尽管领域知识在排序任务中有益，但在更复杂的DSM上却持续降低性能。我们将其归因于LLM的功能先验与纯结构优化目标之间的语义不一致，并提出了“语义对齐假设”作为可验证的条件，以指导知识在LLM中的有效性。消融实验识别出了在实际部署中最有效的输入表示、目标函数设定以及解池设计。这些发现为在工程设计优化中实际部署LLM提供了切实可行的指导。

title: From Mirage to Grounding: Towards Reliable Multimodal Circuit-to-Verilog Code Generation
authors: Guang Yang, Xing Hu, Xiang Chen, Xin Xi
abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly used to translate visual artifacts into code, from UI mockups into HTML to scientific plots into Python scripts. A circuit diagram can be viewed as a visual domain-specific language for hardware: it encodes timing, topology, and bit level semantics that are invisible to casual inspection yet safety critical once fabricated in silicon. Translating such diagrams into register-transfer-level(RTL) code therefore represents an extreme reliability test for vision-to-code generation. We reveal a phenomenon we call Mirage: replacing a circuit diagram with a blank image leaves Pass@k unchanged or even higher, because models bypass the visual input and instead exploit identifier semantics in the module header to retrieve canonical RTL templates. This constitutes a new, highly covert class of defect in AI-assisted code generation that directly undermines MLLMs' trustworthiness. To quantify the effect, we construct C2VEVAL and evaluate eight MLLMs under a paired Normal/Anony protocol in which Anony mode anonymizes all identifiers in both the diagram and the module header; Anony-mode scores drop sharply across all models, confirming that high Normal-mode accuracy is largely a Mirage. We then propose VeriGround (4B), trained with identifier anonymization, refusal augmentation, and D-ORPO (Decision-Focused ORPO) preference alignment that up-weights pivotal generate-or-refuse tokens. VeriGround achieves Functional Pass@1 of 46.11%/42.51%(Normal/Anony) with a False Refusal Rate of only 1.20%/0.00%, while maintaining >92% Refusal Rate on blank images. With only 4B parameters, VeriGround performs on par with GPT-5.4 under Normal and significantly outperforms all baselines under Anony, confirming genuine visual grounding.
title_zh: 从幻想到落地：迈向可靠的多模态电路到Verilog代码生成
abstract_zh:
多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）正被越来越多地用于将视觉内容转化为代码，例如从UI原型图生成HTML，或从科学图表生成Python脚本。电路图可被视为一种硬件领域的专用视觉语言：它编码了时序、拓扑结构以及比特级语义，这些信息对普通观察者而言不可见，但在硅片制造后却至关重要。因此，将此类电路图转换为寄存器传输级（RTL）代码，是对视觉到代码生成能力的一次极端可靠性考验。

我们发现了一种名为“幻影”（Mirage）的现象：即使将电路图替换为一张空白图像，模型的Pass@k指标仍保持不变甚至更高。这是因为模型绕过了视觉输入，转而依赖模块头部中的标识符语义，以检索标准的RTL模板。这构成了一类全新的、高度隐蔽的AI辅助代码生成缺陷，直接损害了MLLMs的可信度。

为量化该现象的影响，我们构建了C2VEVAL基准，并采用配对的“正常/匿名”（Normal/Anony）评估协议对八种MLLMs进行测试。在“匿名”模式下，电路图及模块头部中的所有标识符均被匿名化；结果显示，所有模型在Anony模式下的得分均显著下降，证实了高Normal模式准确率很大程度上源于“幻影”效应。

随后，我们提出了VeriGround（4B），该模型通过标识符匿名化训练、拒绝增强以及D-ORPO（决策导向ORPO）偏好对齐方法进行优化，特别强化了关键的“生成或拒绝”token的重要性。VeriGround在Normal/Anony模式下分别达到46.11%/42.51%的功能性Pass@1，且错误拒绝率仅为1.20%/0.00%，同时在空白图像输入下仍能保持超过92%的拒绝率。仅用40亿参数，VeriGround在Normal模式下表现媲美GPT-5.4，在Anony模式下则显著超越所有基线模型，充分证明其具备真正的视觉语义 grounding 能力。

title: When Agents Evolve, Institutions Follow
authors: Chao Fei, Hongcheng Guo, Yanghua Xiao
abstract: Across millennia, complex societies have faced the same coordination problem of how to organize collective action among cognitively bounded and informationally incomplete individuals. Different civilizations developed different political institutions to answer the same basic questions of who proposes, who reviews, who executes, and how errors are corrected. We argue that multi-agent systems built on large language models face the same challenge. Their central problem is not only individual intelligence, but collective organization. Historical institutions therefore provide a structured design space for multi-agent architectures, making key trade-offs between efficiency and error correction, centralization and distribution, and specialization and redundancy empirically testable. We translate seven historical political institutions, spanning four canonical governance patterns, into executable multi-agent architectures and evaluate them under identical conditions across three large language models and two benchmarks. We find that governance topology strongly shapes collective performance. Within a single model, the gap between the best and worst institution exceeds 57 percentage points, while the optimal architecture shifts systematically with model capability and task characteristics. These results suggest that collective intelligence will not advance through a single optimal organizational form, but through governance mechanisms that can be reselected and reconfigured as tasks and capabilities evolve. More broadly, this points to a transition from \textbf{self-evolving agents} to the \textbf{self-evolving multi-agent system}. The code is available on \href{https://github.com/cf3i/SocialSystemArena}{GitHub}.
title_zh: 当特工进化时，制度随之而变
abstract_zh: 数千年来，复杂社会始终面临一个相同的协调难题：如何在认知能力有限且信息不完整的个体之间组织集体行动。不同文明发展出各异的政治制度，以回应关于“谁提出方案、谁进行审查、谁执行决策，以及错误如何纠正”等基本问题。我们认为，基于大语言模型构建的多智能体系统也面临着同样的挑战。其核心问题不仅在于个体智能，更在于集体组织。因此，历史上的政治制度为多智能体架构提供了结构化的设计空间，使效率与纠错、集中化与分布式、专业化与冗余性之间的关键权衡得以通过实证方式进行检验。我们把七种历史上的政治制度——涵盖四种典型的治理模式——转化为可执行的多智能体架构，并在三个大型语言模型和两个基准测试上，在相同条件下进行评估。研究发现，治理拓扑结构对集体表现具有显著影响。在同一模型内，表现最佳与最差的制度之间差距超过57个百分点；而最优架构则随着模型能力与任务特性的变化而系统性地发生转变。这些结果表明，集体智能的进步不会依赖于单一最优的组织形式，而是依赖于能够随任务和能力演进而重新选择与重构的治理机制。更广泛地说，这预示着从**自我进化的智能体**向**自我进化的多智能体系统**的转变。代码已发布于 \href{https://github.com/cf3i/SocialSystemArena}{GitHub}。

title: Tail-aware N-version Machine Learning Models for Reliable API Recommendation
authors: Aoi Matsuda, Fumio Machida, David Lo
abstract: Machine learning (ML)-based API recommendation helps developers efficiently identify suitable APIs to complement the application code. However, code datasets used to train ML models often exhibit a long-tail distribution, leading to unreliable API recommendations, especially for infrequently used API methods at the tail of the distribution. To address this issue, we propose N-version API Recommendation (NvRec), which leverages N different versions of ML models to enhance the reliability of API sequence recommendations by suppressing unreliable outputs entailing tail APIs. NvRec leverages a set of available ML models and profiles their performance on individual API methods with their tail properties. The generated model profile is used at inference time to filter out unreliable API recommendations and determine the final output. We implement NvRec using five API recommendation models, including CodeBERT, CodeT5, MulaRec, UniXcoder, and CodeT5+, and evaluate it on a public benchmark dataset constructed from compilable Java projects. For the three-version NvRec, we find that the combination of CodeT5, MulaRec, and UniXcoder achieves the highest true accept rate of 83.8%, with a rejection rate of 80.7%, when majority voting is restricted to highly reliable candidates. In contrast, the five-version configuration achieves its highest true accept rate of 83.1% with simple majority voting, while reducing the rejection rate to 69.0%. Overall, the five-version configuration offers a better balance between true accept rate and rejection rate.
title_zh: 面向尾部的多版本机器学习模型在可靠API推荐中的应用
abstract_zh: 基于机器学习（ML）的API推荐有助于开发者高效地识别出能够补充应用代码的合适API。然而，用于训练ML模型的代码数据集通常呈现出长尾分布特征，导致对分布尾部中使用频率较低的API方法的推荐不可靠。为解决这一问题，我们提出了N版本API推荐（NvRec），该方法利用N个不同版本的ML模型来增强API序列推荐的可靠性，通过抑制包含尾部API的不可靠输出实现目标。NvRec利用一组可用的ML模型，并对其在各个API方法上的表现及其尾部特性进行性能分析，生成模型性能画像。在推理阶段，该画像被用来过滤掉不可靠的API推荐结果，从而确定最终输出。我们使用五种API推荐模型——CodeBERT、CodeT5、MulaRec、UniXcoder和CodeT5+——实现了NvRec，并在由可编译Java项目构建的公开基准数据集上进行了评估。对于三版本NvRec配置，当仅将多数投票限制在高度可靠的候选者时，CodeT5、MulaRec与UniXcoder的组合达到了最高的真实接受率83.8%，同时拒绝率高达80.7%。相比之下，五版本配置采用简单的多数投票策略，最高真实接受率达到83.1%，同时将拒绝率降低至69.0%。总体而言，五版本配置在真实接受率与拒绝率之间提供了更优的平衡。

title: Beyond the Training Distribution: Mapping Generalization Boundaries in Neural Program Synthesis
authors: Henrik Voigt, Michael Habeck, Joachim Giesen
abstract: Large-scale transformers achieve impressive results on program synthesis benchmarks, yet their true generalization capabilities remain obscured by data contamination and opaque training corpora. To rigorously assess whether models are truly generalizing or merely retrieving memorized templates, we introduce a strictly controlled program synthesis environment based on a domain-specific arithmetic grammar. By systematically enumerating and evaluating millions of unique programs, we construct interpretable syntactic and semantic metric spaces. This allows us to precisely map data distributions and sample train and test splits that isolate specific distributional shifts. Our experiments demonstrate that optimizing density generalization -- through diverse sampling over both semantic and syntactic spaces -- induces robust out-of-distribution generalization. Conversely, evaluating support generalization reveals that transformers severely struggle with extrapolation, experiencing a performance drop of over 30% when forced to generate syntactically novel programs. While steadily scaling up compute improves generalization, the gains follow a strictly log-linear relationship. We conclude that robust generalization requires maximizing training diversity across multiple manifolds, and our findings indicate the necessity for novel search-based approaches to break through current log-linear scaling bottlenecks.
title_zh: 超越训练分布：神经程序合成中的泛化边界映射
abstract_zh: 大规模变压器模型在程序合成基准测试中取得了令人瞩目的成果，但其真正的泛化能力却因数据污染和不透明的训练语料而难以清晰揭示。为了严格评估模型是否真正具备泛化能力，而非仅仅检索记忆中的模板，我们引入了一个基于特定领域算术语法的严格受控程序合成环境。通过系统地枚举并评估数百万个唯一程序，我们构建了可解释的语法与语义度量空间，从而能够精确映射数据分布，并设计出隔离特定分布偏移的训练与测试划分。实验表明，通过在语义和语法空间中进行多样化采样以优化密度泛化，能够有效提升模型在分布外样本上的鲁棒泛化能力；而支持泛化的评估则揭示，变压器模型在外推任务中表现严重不足，当被要求生成语法上全新的程序时，性能下降超过30%。尽管持续增加计算资源有助于提升泛化能力，但其增益遵循严格的对数线性关系。我们得出结论：实现稳健泛化需要在多个流形上最大化训练数据的多样性；我们的研究结果也表明，必须发展新型基于搜索的方法，才能突破当前对数线性扩展的瓶颈。

title: VitaLLM: A Versatile, Ultra-Compact Ternary LLM Accelerator with Dependency-Aware Scheduling
authors: Zi-Wei Lin, Tian-Sheuan Chang
abstract: Deploying Large Language Models (LLMs) on resource-constrained edge devices faces critical bottlenecks in memory bandwidth and power consumption. While ternary quantization (e.g., BitNet b1.58) significantly reduces model size, its direct deployment on general-purpose hardware is hindered by workload imbalance, bandwidth-bound decoding, and strict data dependencies. To address these challenges, we propose \textbf{VitaLLM}, a hardware-software co-designed accelerator tailored for efficient ternary LLM inference. We introduce a heterogeneous \textbf{Dual-Core Compute Strategy} that synergizes specialized TINT-Cores for massive ternary projections with a unified BoothFlex-Core for mixed-precision attention, ensuring high utilization across both compute-bound prefill and bandwidth-bound decode stages. Furthermore, we develop a \textbf{Leading One Prediction (LOP)} mechanism to prune redundant Key-Value (KV) cache fetches and a \textbf{Dependency-Aware Scheduling} framework to hide the latency of nonlinear operations. Implemented in TSMC 16nm technology, VitaLLM achieves a decoding throughput of 70.70 tokens/s within an ultra-compact area of 0.223 mm$^2$ and a power consumption of 65.97 mW. The design delivers a superior Figure of Merit (FOM) of 17.4 TOPS/mm$^2$/W, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art accelerators. Finally, we explore an extended bit-serial design (BoothFlex-BS) to demonstrate the architecture's adaptability for precision-agile inference.
title_zh: VitaLLM：一种具备依赖感知调度的多功能超紧凑三值大模型加速器
abstract_zh: 在资源受限的边缘设备上部署大语言模型（LLM）面临内存带宽和功耗消耗的关键瓶颈。尽管三值量化（如BitNet b1.58）显著减小了模型规模，但其直接在通用硬件上部署仍受制于负载不均衡、带宽受限的解码过程以及严格的依赖关系。为应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种面向高效三值LLM推理的软硬件协同设计加速器——\textbf{VitaLLM}。我们引入了一种异构的\textbf{双核计算策略}，通过专用的TINT-Cores实现大规模三值投影运算，同时利用统一的BoothFlex-Core完成混合精度注意力计算，从而在计算密集型预填充阶段与带宽受限的解码阶段均实现高利用率。此外，我们设计了\textbf{首位预测（LOP）机制}，以减少冗余的键值（KV）缓存读取，并提出\textbf{依赖感知调度框架}，有效隐藏非线性操作带来的延迟。基于TSMC 16nm工艺实现的VitaLLM，在仅0.223 mm$^2$的超紧凑面积下实现了70.70 tokens/s的解码吞吐量，功耗仅为65.97 mW。该设计取得了高达17.4 TOPS/mm$^2$/W的卓越性能指标（FOM），显著优于现有顶尖加速器。最后，我们进一步探索了一种扩展的位串行架构（BoothFlex-BS），验证了该架构在支持精度自适应推理方面的良好可扩展性。

title: Focus Session: Autonomous Systems Dependability in the era of AI: Design Challenges in Safety, Security, Reliability and Certification
authors: Behnaz Ranjbar, Kirankumar Raveendiran, Sudeep Pasricha, Samarjit Chakraborty, Cecilia Carbonelli, Akash Kumar
abstract: The design of embedded safety-critical systems such as those used in next-generation automotive and autonomous platforms, is increasingly challenged by escalating system complexity, hardware-software heterogeneity, and the integration of intelligent, data-driven components. Ensuring dependability in such systems requires a holistic approach that spans multiple abstraction layers and encompasses both design- and run-time assurance. Traditional methods for reliability, safety, and security management often fall short in addressing the dynamic and uncertain behaviors introduced by Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) components, especially under stringent real-time, power, and safety constraints. While AI and ML offer powerful predictive, adaptive, and self-optimizing capabilities that can enhance system dependability, their inherent non-determinism, data-dependence, and lack of formal guarantees introduce new challenges for verification, validation, and certification. This paper explores emerging methodologies, architectures, and frameworks for designing dependable autonomous and embedded systems in the era of AI. It highlight advances in reliability modeling, secure system design, and certification approaches that account for imperfect, learning-enabled components, aiming to bridge the gap between AI innovation and certifiable system-level dependability.
title_zh: 焦点研讨：人工智能时代自主系统可靠性：安全、防护、可靠性和认证中的设计挑战
abstract_zh: 下一代汽车及自动驾驶平台所使用的嵌入式安全关键系统的设计，正面临日益增长的系统复杂性、软硬件异构性，以及智能数据驱动组件集成所带来的挑战。确保此类系统的可靠性，需要一种涵盖多个抽象层次、融合设计时与运行时保障的综合性方法。传统的可靠性、安全性和安全性管理方法在应对人工智能（AI）和机器学习（ML）组件引入的动态与不确定性行为时往往力不从心，尤其是在严格的实时性、功耗和安全约束条件下。尽管AI与ML提供了强大的预测、自适应和自我优化能力，有助于提升系统可靠性，但其固有的非确定性、对数据的依赖性以及缺乏形式化保证，给系统的验证、确认和认证带来了新的挑战。本文探讨了在AI时代设计可靠自主与嵌入式系统所涌现的新方法、新架构与新框架，重点介绍了在可靠性建模、安全系统设计以及认证方法方面的最新进展，旨在应对由不完善、具备学习能力的组件所带来的问题，弥合AI技术创新与可认证的系统级可靠性之间的鸿沟。

title: Intent2Tx: Benchmarking LLMs for Translating Natural Language Intents into Ethereum Transactions
authors: Zhuoran Pan, Yue Li, Zhi Guan, Jianbin Hu, Zhong Chen
abstract: The emergence of Large Language Models (LLMs) offers a transformative interface for Web3, yet existing benchmarks fail to capture the complexity of translating high-level user intents into functionally correct, state-dependent on-chain transactions. We present \textsc{Intent2Tx}, a high-fidelity benchmark featuring 29,921 single-step and 1,575 multi-step instances meticulously derived from 300 days of real-world Ethereum mainnet traces. Unlike prior works that rely on synthetic instructions, \textsc{Intent2Tx} grounds natural language intents in real-world protocol interactions across 11 categories, including diverse long-tail Decentralized Finance (DeFi) primitives. To enable rigorous evaluation, we propose an execution-aware framework that transcends surface-level text matching by employing differential state analysis on forked mainnet environments. Our extensive evaluation of 16 state-of-the-art LLMs reveals that while scaling and retrieval-augmentation enhance logical consistency and parameter precision, current models struggle with out-of-distribution generalization and multi-step planning. Crucially, our execution-based analysis demonstrates that syntactically valid outputs often fail to achieve intended state transitions, highlighting a significant gap in current "reasoning-to-execution" capabilities. \textsc{Intent2Tx} serves as a critical foundation for developing autonomous, reliable agents in intent-centric Web3 ecosystems. Code and data: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Intent2Tx_Bench-97FF .
title_zh: Intent2Tx：用于将自然语言意图翻译为以太坊交易的大型语言模型基准测试
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）的出现为Web3带来了变革性的交互界面，然而现有的评估基准无法充分捕捉将高层次用户意图转化为功能正确且依赖于状态的链上交易这一复杂过程。我们提出了 \textsc{Intent2Tx}，这是一个高保真度的基准测试集，包含从300天真实以太坊主网交易记录中精心提取的29,921个单步实例和1,575个多步实例。与以往依赖合成指令的研究不同，\textsc{Intent2Tx} 将自然语言意图扎根于11个类别的真实协议交互中，涵盖多样化的长尾去中心化金融（DeFi）原语。为实现严谨的评估，我们提出了一种执行感知框架，通过在分叉的主网环境中进行差分状态分析，超越了表面文本匹配的局限。对16个前沿LLM的广泛评估表明，尽管模型规模扩大和检索增强能提升逻辑一致性和参数精度，但当前模型在分布外泛化和多步规划方面仍存在显著困难。尤为重要的是，我们的基于执行的分析揭示：语法正确的输出往往无法实现预期的状态转移，暴露出当前“推理到执行”能力的重大差距。\textsc{Intent2Tx} 为构建以用户意图为中心的Web3生态中自主、可靠的智能代理提供了关键基础。代码与数据：https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Intent2Tx_Bench-97FF

title: Optimization before Evaluation: Evaluation with Unoptimised Prompts Can be Misleading
authors: Nicholas Sadjoli, Tim Siefken, Atin Ghosh, Yifan Mai, Daniel Dahlmeier
abstract: Current Large Language Model (LLM) evaluation frameworks utilize the same static prompt template across all models under evaluation. This differs from the common industry practice of using prompt optimization (PO) techniques to optimize the prompt for each model to maximize application performance. In this paper, we investigate the effect of PO towards LLM evaluations. Our results on public academic and internal industry benchmarks show that PO greatly affects the final ranking of models. This highlights the importance of practitioners performing PO per model when conducting evaluations to choose the best model for a given task.
title_zh: 优化前的评估：未经优化的提示词进行评估可能会产生误导
abstract_zh: 当前大型语言模型（LLM）的评估框架在所有被评估模型上使用相同的静态提示模板。这与业界普遍采用的提示优化（Prompt Optimization, PO）技术存在差异，后者会针对每个模型优化提示，以最大化应用性能。本文研究了提示优化对LLM评估的影响。我们在公开的学术基准和内部行业基准上的实验结果表明，提示优化显著影响模型的最终排名。这一发现凸显了在进行模型评估以选择最适合特定任务的模型时，为每个模型单独执行提示优化的重要性。

title: SecGoal: A Benchmark for Security Goal Extraction and Formalization from Protocol Documents
authors: Dawei Huang, Hui Li, Haonan Feng, Jingjing Guan, Yueshuang Jiao, Bo Jia
abstract: Formal verification provides rigorous guarantees for cryptographic security, yet automating the extraction and formalization of security goals from natural language protocol documents remains a major bottleneck, compounded by the scarcity of expert-annotated resources and integrated frameworks bridging unstructured text and symbolic logic. We introduce SecGoal, the first expert-annotated benchmark covering 15 widely deployed protocol documents, including 5G-AKA and TLS 1.3, and AIFG, an AI-assisted framework that decomposes the task into context-aware goal extraction and retrieval-augmented formalization. We conduct a comprehensive evaluation to assess whether contemporary LLMs are ready to automate this pipeline. Our results reveal a pronounced precision-recall imbalance: frontier models, such as Gemini 2.5-Pro, achieve high recall but precision below 15%, frequently misclassifying operational text as security goals. In contrast, instruction tuning on SecGoal enables compact models with 7B/9B parameters to achieve F1-scores above 80%, substantially outperforming larger general-purpose models. Our work establishes a foundational dataset and reproducible baseline for automated formal protocol analysis.
title_zh: SecGoal：从协议文档中提取与形式化安全目标的基准数据集
abstract_zh: 形式化验证为密码学安全性提供了严格的保障，然而，从自然语言协议文档中自动提取并形式化安全目标仍是一个主要瓶颈，这不仅由于专家标注资源稀缺，也因缺乏能够连接非结构化文本与符号逻辑的集成框架。我们提出了SecGoal，这是首个由专家标注的基准数据集，涵盖15个广泛部署的协议文档，包括5G-AKA和TLS 1.3；同时引入AIFG——一种AI辅助框架，将任务分解为上下文感知的目标提取与检索增强的形式化两个阶段。我们对当前主流大模型是否具备自动化该流程的能力进行了全面评估。结果表明，存在显著的精确率-召回率失衡：前沿模型如Gemini 2.5-Pro虽具有高召回率，但精确率低于15%，常将操作性文本误判为安全目标。相比之下，在SecGoal上进行指令微调后，仅7B/9B参数量的小型模型即可实现超过80%的F1分数，显著优于更大规模的通用模型。本研究建立了一个基础数据集与可复现的基准，为自动化形式化协议分析奠定了重要基础。

title: EdgeFM: Efficient Edge Inference for Vision-Language Models
authors: Mengling Deng, Yuanpeng Chen, Sheng Yang, Wei Tao, Wenhai Zhang, Hui Song, Linyuanhao Qin, Kai Zhao, Xiaojun Ye, Shanhui Mo, Jingli Fan, Shuang Zhang, Bei Liu, Tiankun Zhao, Xiangjing An
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have demonstrated strong applicability in edge industrial applications, yet their deployment remains severely constrained by requirements for deterministic low latency and stable execution under resource limitations. Existing frameworks either rely on bloated general-purpose designs or force developers into opaque, hardware-specific closed-source ecosystems, leading to hardware lock-in limitation and poor cross-platform adaptability. Observing that modern AI agents can efficiently search and tune configurations to generate highly optimized low-level kernels for standard LLM operators, we propose EdgeFM, a lightweight, agent-driven VLM/LLM inference framework tailored for cross-platform industrial edge deployment. EdgeFM removes non-essential features to reduce single-request latency, and encapsulates agent-tuned kernel optimizations as a modular library of reusable skills. By allowing direct invocation of these skills rather than waiting for closed-source implementations, it effectively closes the performance gap long dominated by proprietary toolchains. The framework natively supports mainstream platforms including x86 and NVIDIA Orin SoCs, and represents the first end-to-end VLA deployment on the domestic Horizon Journey platform, enhancing cross-platform portability. In most cases, it yields clearly better inference performance than conventional vendor-specific toolchains, achieving up to 1.49 times speedup over TensorRT-Edge-LLM on the NVIDIA Orin platform. Experimental results show that EdgeFM delivers favorable end-to-end inference performance, providing an open-source, production-grade solution for diverse edge industrial scenarios.
title_zh: EdgeFM：面向视觉-语言模型的高效边缘推理
abstract_zh: 视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在边缘工业应用中展现出强大的适用性，但其部署仍受到确定性低延迟和资源受限环境下稳定执行的严格要求制约。现有的框架要么依赖臃肿的通用设计，要么迫使开发者进入不透明、硬件特定的闭源生态系统，导致硬件绑定问题严重，跨平台适应能力差。观察到现代AI代理能够高效搜索并调优配置，为标准LLM算子生成高度优化的底层内核，我们提出了EdgeFM——一种轻量级、基于智能体驱动的VLM/LLM推理框架，专为跨平台工业边缘部署而设计。EdgeFM通过去除非必要功能以降低单请求延迟，并将智能体调优的内核优化封装为可复用的模块化技能库。通过直接调用这些技能，而非等待闭源实现，有效缩小了长期由专有工具链主导的性能差距。该框架原生支持主流平台，包括x86和NVIDIA Orin SoC，并首次实现了国内Horizon Journey平台上的端到端VLA部署，显著提升了跨平台可移植性。实验结果表明，在大多数情况下，EdgeFM的推理性能明显优于传统厂商专用工具链，在NVIDIA Orin平台上相比TensorRT-Edge-LLM最高实现1.49倍的加速。实验数据证明，EdgeFM具备优异的端到端推理表现，为多样化的边缘工业场景提供了一个开源、可投入生产的解决方案。

title: From Coarse to Fine: Benchmarking and Reward Modeling for Writing-Centric Generation Tasks
authors: Qingyu Ren, Tianjun Pan, Xingzhou Chen, Xuhong Wang
abstract: Large language models have achieved remarkable progress in text generation but still struggle with generative writing tasks. In terms of evaluation, existing benchmarks evaluate writing reward models coarsely and fail to measure performance from the perspective of specific requirements. In terms of training, existing training methods either use LLM-as-a-judge approaches or train coarse-grained reward models, lacking fine-grained requirement-adherence reward modeling. To address these issues, we propose a fine-grained evaluation pipeline WEval for writing reward models and a fine-grained reinforcement learning training framework WRL. The evaluation data of WEval covers multiple task categories and requirement types, enabling systematic evaluation of writing reward models by measuring the correlation between the rankings of the reward model and gold rankings. WRL constructs positive and negative samples by selectively dropping instruction requirements, allowing for more precise reward model training. Experiments show that our models achieve substantial improvements across various writing benchmarks and exhibit strong generalization. The code and data are publicly available at \href{https://github.com/Rainier-rq1/From_Coarse_to_Fine}{https://github.com/Rainier-rq1/From\_Coarse\_to\_Fine}.
title_zh: 从粗到细：面向写作中心生成任务的基准测试与奖励建模
abstract_zh: 大规模语言模型在文本生成方面取得了显著进展，但在生成式写作任务上仍面临挑战。在评估方面，现有基准测试对写作奖励模型的评价过于粗略，无法从具体需求角度衡量性能；在训练方面，现有方法要么采用“大模型作为评判者”（LLM-as-a-judge）的方式，要么训练粗粒度的奖励模型，缺乏对细粒度需求遵循性的奖励建模。为解决这些问题，我们提出了一个细粒度的评估流程 WEval 用于写作奖励模型，以及一个细粒度强化学习训练框架 WRL。WEval 的评估数据覆盖了多种任务类别和需求类型，能够通过测量奖励模型排名与黄金标准排名之间的相关性，实现对写作奖励模型的系统性评估。WRL 通过有选择地删除指令中的需求来构建正负样本，从而实现更精准的奖励模型训练。实验结果表明，我们的模型在多个写作基准上均取得显著提升，并展现出强大的泛化能力。代码与数据已公开，可访问：\href{https://github.com/Rainier-rq1/From_Coarse_to_Fine}{https://github.com/Rainier-rq1/From\_Coarse\_to\_Fine}。

title: Beyond One-Size-Fits-All Exercises: Personalizing Computer Science Worksheets with Large Language Models
authors: Franco Ortiz, Runlong Ye, Michael Liut
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have been widely applied to student-facing educational tools, this work explores their use in supporting instructors by presenting a practical adaptation of the Framework for Adaptive Content using Educational Technology (FACET) system to generate personalized instructional materials for an Introduction to Computer Programming (CS1) course. We conducted a mixed-methods study with 409 first-year computer science (CS) students, focusing on regular expressions (RegEx). Students were assessed on their knowledge and motivation, classified into one of four learner profiles, and assigned either LLM-personalized (treatment) or standard non-adaptive (control) exercises. Personalized materials varied in scaffolding, instructional explicitness, and tone based on learner profiles grounded in Bloom's Taxonomy and Self-Determination Theory. Quantitative analysis reveals that standard exercises resulted in task incompletion among low-knowledge learners, with approximately 25-30% incompletion, whereas personalized materials sustained near-universal completion (>99%) across all profiles. While high-performing students experienced ceiling effects, Low Knowledge/Low Motivation students achieved significantly higher correctness (+18.2%) with personalized support. Survey data indicate that students prioritize structural scaffolding (logical sequence, difficulty pacing) over motivational tone and perceive the adaptive tasks as equally challenging as standard exercises. These findings suggest that learner-profile-driven LLM personalization primarily serves as a retention scaffold, preventing task abandonment among at-risk students without diminishing the task's "desirable difficulty". The results demonstrate that instructor-facing LLM systems can effectively close engagement gaps in CS1 by tailoring instructional explicitness to student needs.
title_zh: 超越“一刀切”练习：利用大型语言模型个性化计算机科学作业
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）已被广泛应用于面向学生的教育工具中。本文探讨了其在支持教师方面的应用，提出了一种对自适应内容教育技术框架（FACET）系统的实用化改进，用于为《计算机编程导论》（CS1）课程生成个性化的教学材料。我们对409名一年级计算机科学（CS）学生开展了一项混合方法研究，聚焦于正则表达式（RegEx）的学习。学生首先接受知识水平与学习动机的评估，并根据其表现被划分为四个学习者类型，随后被分配至由LLM个性化生成的练习（实验组）或标准非自适应练习（对照组）。个性化材料依据学习者类型，在支架支持、教学明确性及语气等方面进行调整，其理论基础源于布卢姆认知分类学与自我决定理论。定量分析显示，对于知识水平较低的学生，标准练习导致约25%-30%的任务未能完成；而个性化材料则在所有学习者类型中均实现了接近全员完成（>99%）。尽管高绩效学生出现“天花板效应”，但低知识-低动机群体在个性化支持下正确率显著提升（+18.2%）。调查数据表明，学生更重视结构化支架（如逻辑顺序、难度递进），而非激励性语气；同时，他们认为自适应任务与标准任务具有同等挑战性。研究结果表明，基于学习者画像的LLM个性化策略主要发挥的是保留性支架作用，有效防止高风险学生中途放弃任务，同时并未削弱任务应有的“理想难度”。研究证实，面向教师的LLM系统能够通过根据学生需求动态调整教学明确性，有效弥合CS1课程中的参与差距。

title: Investigating More Explainable and Partition-Free Compositionality Estimation for LLMs: A Rule-Generation Perspective
authors: Ziyao Xu, Cong Wang, Houfeng Wang
abstract: Compositional generalization tests are often used to estimate the compositionality of LLMs. However, such tests have the following limitations: (1) they only focus on the output results without considering LLMs' understanding of sample compositionality, resulting in explainability defects; (2) they rely on dataset partition to form the test set with combinations unseen in the training set, suffering from combination leakage issues. In this work, we propose a novel rule-generation perspective for compositionality estimation for LLMs. It requires LLMs to generate a program as rules for dataset mapping and provides estimates of the compositionality of LLMs using complexity-based theory. The perspective addresses the limitations of compositional generalization tests and provides a new way to analyze the compositionality characterization of LLMs. We conduct experiments and analysis of existing advanced LLMs based on this perspective on a string-to-grid task, and find various compositionality characterizations and compositionality deficiencies exhibited by LLMs.
title_zh: 探索更可解释且无需划分的大型语言模型组合性估计方法：一种规则生成视角
abstract_zh: 组合泛化测试常被用于评估大语言模型（LLMs）的组合性。然而，这类测试存在以下局限性：（1）仅关注输出结果，而未考虑LLMs对样本组合性的理解，导致可解释性缺陷；（2）依赖数据集划分来构建训练集中未出现过的组合测试集，因而存在组合泄露问题。在本研究中，我们提出一种全新的规则生成视角来估计LLMs的组合性。该方法要求LLMs生成用于数据集映射的程序规则，并基于复杂性理论对LLMs的组合性进行量化评估。这一视角有效克服了传统组合泛化测试的局限性，为分析LLMs的组合性特征提供了新途径。我们在字符串到网格任务上，基于该视角对现有先进LLMs进行了实验与分析，发现LLMs呈现出多种组合性特征以及不同程度的组合性缺陷。

title: Models Recall What They Violate: Constraint Adherence in Multi-Turn LLM Ideation
authors: Garvin Kruthof
abstract: When researchers iteratively refine ideas with large language models, do the models preserve fidelity to the original objective? We introduce DriftBench, a benchmark for evaluating constraint adherence in multi-turn LLM-assisted scientific ideation. Across 2,146 scored benchmark runs spanning seven models from five providers (including two open-weight), four interaction conditions, and 38 research briefs from 24 scientific domains, we find that iterative pressure reliably increases structural complexity and often reduces adherence to original constraints. A restatement probe reveals a dissociation between declarative recall and behavioral adherence, as models accurately restate constraints they simultaneously violate. The knows-but-violates (KBV) rate, measuring constraint non-compliance despite preserved recall, ranges from 8% to 99% across models. Structured checkpointing partially reduces KBV rates but does not close the dissociation, and complexity inflation persists. Human validation against blind raters confirms that the LLM judge under-detects constraint violations, making reported constraint adherence scores conservative. Sensitivity analyses confirm the findings are robust to temperature (0.7 vs.\ 1.0) and pressure type (novelty vs.\ rigor). We release all briefs, prompts, rubrics, transcripts, and scores as an open benchmark.
title_zh: 模型会记住它们所违反的规则：多轮大语言模型创意生成中的约束遵循性
abstract_zh: 当研究人员与大语言模型反复迭代优化想法时，这些模型能否保持对原始目标的忠实？我们提出了 DriftBench——一个用于评估多轮大语言模型辅助科学创意生成中约束遵守情况的基准测试。在涵盖来自五家供应商（包括两个开源权重模型）的七种模型、四种交互条件以及来自24个科学领域的38份研究简报的2,146次评分基准测试中，我们发现：迭代压力会可靠地增加结构复杂性，但常常导致对原始约束的偏离。通过重述探测实验，我们发现声明性记忆与行为遵从之间存在脱节：模型能够准确复述它们同时违反的约束。衡量“明知却违反”（Knows-But-Violates, KBV）的比率显示，在不同模型间，该比率从8%到99%不等。结构化检查点机制虽部分降低了KBV率，但未能弥合这一脱节，且复杂度膨胀现象依然存在。与盲评人类验证者的对比表明，大语言模型作为评判者会低估约束违规情况，因此报告的约束遵守分数具有保守倾向。敏感性分析进一步证实，上述发现对温度（0.7 vs. 1.0）和压力类型（新颖性 vs. 严谨性）均具有鲁棒性。我们已将所有研究简报、提示语、评分标准、对话记录及评分结果公开发布，作为开放基准供学术界使用。

title: Language Models Refine Mechanical Linkage Designs Through Symbolic Reflection and Modular Optimisation
authors: João Pedro Gandarela, Thiago Rios, Stefan Menzel, André Freitas
abstract: Designing mechanical linkages involves combinatorial topology selection and continuous parameter fitting. We show that language models can systematically improve linkage designs through symbolic representations. Language model agents explore discrete topologies while numerical optimisers fit continuous parameters. A symbolic lifting operator translates simulator trajectories into qualitative descriptors, motion labels, temporal predicates, and structural diagnostics that models interpret across iterative design cycles. Across six engineering-relevant motion targets and three open-source models (Llama 3.3 70B, Qwen3 4B, Qwen3 MoE 30B-A3B), the modular architecture reduces geometric error by up to 68% and improves structural validity by up to 134% over monolithic baselines. Critically, 78.6% of iterative refinement trajectories show measurable improvement, with the system correctly diagnosing overconstraint (56.3%) and underconstraint (35.6%) failure modes and proposing grounded corrections. Models across all three families acquire interpretable mechanical reasoning strategies without fine-tuning, demonstrating that principled symbolic abstraction bridges generative AI and the numerical precision required for engineering design.
title_zh: 语言模型通过符号反思与模块化优化改进机械连杆设计
abstract_zh: 机械连杆机构的设计涉及组合拓扑结构的选择与连续参数的拟合。我们证明，语言模型可通过符号化表示系统性地提升连杆设计质量。语言模型代理负责探索离散的拓扑结构，而数值优化器则用于拟合连续参数。一种符号升维算子将仿真轨迹转化为定性描述、运动标签、时间谓词以及结构诊断信息，使模型能够在迭代设计周期中进行理解与推理。在六个工程相关的运动目标上，基于三个开源模型（Llama 3.3 70B、Qwen3 4B、Qwen3 MoE 30B-A3B）的实验表明，该模块化架构相较于单一整体式基线方法，几何误差降低高达68%，结构有效性提升达134%。关键的是，在78.6%的迭代优化路径中均观察到可测量的性能改进，系统能够准确诊断出过约束（56.3%）和欠约束（35.6%）等失效模式，并提出基于证据的修正方案。所有三类模型均无需微调即可习得可解释的机械推理策略，这表明，经过合理设计的符号抽象，能够有效弥合生成式人工智能与工程设计所要求的数值精确性之间的鸿沟。

title: From Unstructured Recall to Schema-Grounded Memory: Reliable AI Memory via Iterative, Schema-Aware Extraction
authors: Alex Petrov, Alexander Gusak, Denis Mukha, Dima Korolev
abstract: Persistent AI memory is often reduced to a retrieval problem: store prior interactions as text, embed them, and ask the model to recover relevant context later. This design is useful for thematic recall, but it is mismatched to the kinds of memory that agents need in production: exact facts, current state, updates and deletions, aggregation, relations, negative queries, and explicit unknowns. These operations require memory to behave less like search and more like a system of record. This paper argues that reliable external AI memory must be schema-grounded. Schemas define what must be remembered, what may be ignored, and which values must never be inferred. We present an iterative, schema-aware write path that decomposes memory ingestion into object detection, field detection, and field-value extraction, with validation gates, local retries, and stateful prompt control. The result shifts interpretation from the read path to the write path: reads become constrained queries over verified records rather than repeated inference over retrieved prose. We evaluate this design on structured extraction and end-to-end memory benchmarks. On the extraction benchmark, the judge-in-the-loop configuration reaches 90.42% object-level accuracy and 62.67% output accuracy, above all tested frontier structured-output baselines. On our end-to-end memory benchmark, xmemory reaches 97.10% F1, compared with 80.16%-87.24% across the third-party baselines. On the application-level task, xmemory reaches 95.2% accuracy, outperforming specialised memory systems, code-generated Markdown harnesses, and customer-facing frontier-model application harnesses. The results show that, for memory workloads requiring stable facts and stateful computation, architecture matters more than retrieval scale or model strength alone.
title_zh: 从非结构化回忆到基于模式的记忆：通过迭代式、模式感知的提取实现可靠的AI记忆
abstract_zh:
持续性AI记忆常被简化为一个检索问题：将先前的交互内容以文本形式存储，进行嵌入处理，再让模型在后续阶段恢复相关上下文。这种设计对主题回忆有一定帮助，但与生产环境中智能体所需的记忆类型不匹配——后者需要精确的事实、当前状态、更新与删除操作、聚合处理、关系建模、否定查询以及显式的未知信息。这些操作要求记忆系统的行为更接近于“记录系统”，而非简单的搜索机制。

本文主张，可靠的外部AI记忆必须基于模式（schema）构建。模式定义了必须记住的内容、可以忽略的信息，以及哪些值绝不能通过推断获得。我们提出一种迭代式、模式感知的写入路径，将记忆摄入过程分解为对象检测、字段检测和字段值提取三个阶段，并引入验证关卡、本地重试机制以及有状态的提示控制。这一设计将理解的重点从读取路径转移到写入路径：读取操作变为对已验证记录的受限查询，而非反复对检索到的文本进行推理。

我们在结构化提取和端到端记忆基准测试中评估了该设计。在结构化提取基准测试中，采用“裁判在环”配置的系统达到了90.42%的对象级准确率和62.67%的输出准确率，优于所有测试过的前沿结构化输出基线模型。在我们的端到端记忆基准测试中，xmemory系统的F1分数达到97.10%，显著高于第三方基线模型的80.16%至87.24%区间。在应用层面任务中，xmemory实现95.2%的准确率，超越了专用记忆系统、代码生成的Markdown封装方案，以及面向客户的前沿模型应用封装。

结果表明，在需要稳定事实和状态化计算的记忆工作负载中，系统架构的重要性远超单纯的检索规模或模型强度。

title: Rethinking Agentic Reinforcement Learning In Large Language Models
authors: Fangming Cui, Ruixiao Zhu, Cheng Fang, Sunan Li, Jiahong Li
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has traditionally focused on training specialized agents to optimize predefined reward functions within narrowly defined environments. However, the advent of powerful Large Language Models (LLMs) and increasingly complex, open-ended tasks has catalyzed a paradigm shift towards agentic paradigms within RL. This emerging framework extends beyond traditional RL by emphasizing the development of autonomous agents capable of goal-setting, long-term planning, dynamic strategy adaptation, and interactive reasoning in uncertain, real-world environments. Unlike conventional approaches that rely heavily on static objectives and episodic interactions, LLM-based Agentic RL incorporates cognitive-like capabilities such as meta-reasoning, self-reflection, and multi-step decision-making directly into the learning loop. In this paper, we provide a deep insight for looking the conceptual foundations, methodological innovations, and effective designs underlying this trend. Furthermore, we identify critical challenges and outline promising future directions for building LLM-based Agentic RL.
title_zh: 重新思考大语言模型中的代理强化学习
abstract_zh: 强化学习（Reinforcement Learning, RL）传统上专注于训练特定的智能体，在限定的环境中优化预定义的奖励函数。然而，随着强大大型语言模型（Large Language Models, LLMs）的出现以及任务复杂性与开放性的不断提升，RL领域正经历一场范式转变，朝着基于智能体（Agentic）的框架演进。这一新兴范式超越了传统的RL方法，强调开发具备自主目标设定、长期规划、动态策略调整以及在不确定的真实环境中进行交互式推理能力的智能体。与依赖静态目标和周期性交互的传统方法不同，基于LLM的智能体强化学习将元推理、自我反思和多步决策等类认知能力直接融入学习过程。本文深入探讨了这一趋势背后的概念基础、方法创新及有效设计，并识别出关键挑战，同时展望了构建基于LLM的智能体强化学习的未来发展方向。

title: Towards Neuro-symbolic Causal Rule Synthesis, Verification, and Evaluation Grounded in Legal and Safety Principles
authors: Zainab Rehan, Christian Medeiros Adriano, Sona Ghahremani, Holger Giese
abstract: Rule-based systems remain central in safety-critical domains but often struggle with scalability, brittleness, and goal misspecification. These limitations can lead to reward hacking and failures in formal verification, as AI systems tend to optimize for narrow objectives. In previous research, we developed a neuro-symbolic causal framework that integrates first-order logic abduction trees, structural causal models, and deep reinforcement learning within a MAPE-K loop to provide explainable adaptations under distribution shifts. In this paper, we extend that framework by introducing a meta-level layer designed to mitigate goal misspecification and support scalable rule maintenance. This layer consists of a Goal/Rule Synthesizer and a Rule Verification Engine, which iteratively refine a formal rule theory from high-level natural-language goals and principles provided by human experts. The synthesis pipeline employs large language models (LLMs) to: (1) decompose goals into candidate causes, (2) consolidate semantics to remove redundancies, (3) translate them into candidate first-order rules, and (4) compose necessary and sufficient causal sets. The verification pipeline then performs (1) syntax and schema validation, (2) logical consistency analysis, and (3) safety and invariant checks before integrating verified rules into the knowledge base. We evaluated our approach with a proof-of-concept implementation in two autonomous driving scenarios. Results indicate that, given human-specified goals and principles, the pipeline can successfully derive minimal necessary and sufficient rule sets and formalize them as logical constraints. These findings suggest that the pipeline supports incremental, modular, and traceable rule synthesis grounded in established legal and safety principles.
title_zh: 基于法律与安全原则的神经符号因果规则合成、验证与评估
abstract_zh:
基于规则的系统在安全关键领域中仍占据核心地位，但常常面临可扩展性差、脆弱性高以及目标设定不准确等问题。这些局限可能导致奖励黑客行为（reward hacking）以及形式化验证失败，因为人工智能系统倾向于优化狭隘的目标。在之前的研究中，我们开发了一种神经符号因果框架，该框架将一阶逻辑溯因树、结构因果模型与深度强化学习相结合，并嵌入MAPE-K循环，以在分布偏移情况下提供可解释的自适应机制。本文在此基础上进一步拓展，引入了一个元层级模块，旨在缓解目标设定不准确问题，并支持可扩展的规则维护。该模块由“目标/规则生成器”和“规则验证引擎”组成，能够从人类专家提供的高层次自然语言目标与原则出发，迭代地完善形式化的规则理论。

生成流程利用大语言模型（LLMs）执行以下步骤：(1) 将目标分解为候选原因；(2) 整合语义以消除冗余；(3) 将其转化为候选的一阶逻辑规则；(4) 构造必要且充分的因果集合。验证流程则依次执行：(1) 语法与模式校验；(2) 逻辑一致性分析；(3) 安全性与不变性检查，随后将通过验证的规则整合进知识库。

我们在两个自动驾驶场景中进行了概念验证实现。结果表明，在给定人类指定的目标与原则的前提下，该流程能够成功推导出最小且必要的规则集，并将其形式化为逻辑约束。这些发现表明，该流程支持基于既有法律与安全原则的增量式、模块化且可追溯的规则生成。

title: Perturbation Probing: A Two-Pass-per-Prompt Diagnostic for FFN Behavioral Circuits in Aligned LLMs
authors: Hongliang Liu, Tung-Ling Li, Yuhao Wu
abstract: Perturbation probing generates task-specific causal hypotheses for FFN neurons in large language models using two forward passes per prompt and no backpropagation, followed by a one-time intervention sweep of about 150 passes amortized across all identified neurons. Across eight behavioral circuits, 13 models, and four architecture families, we identify two circuit structures that organize LLM behavior. Opposition circuits appear when RLHF suppresses a pre-training tendency. In safety refusal, about 50 neurons, or 0.014 percent of all neurons, control the refusal template; ablating them changes 80 percent of response formats on 520 AdvBench prompts while producing near-zero harmful compliance, 3 of 520 cases, all with disclaimers. Routing circuits appear for pre-training behaviors distributed through attention. For language selection, residual-stream direction injection switches English to Chinese output on 99.1 percent of 580 benchmark prompts in the 3 of 19 tested models that satisfy three observed conditions: bilingual training, FFN-to-skip signal ratio between 0.3 and 1.1, and linear representability. The same intervention fails on the other 16 models and on math, code, and factual circuits, defining the limits of directional steering. The FFN-to-skip signal ratio, computed from the same two forward passes, distinguishes the two structures and predicts the appropriate intervention. Circuit topology varies by architecture, from Qwen's concentrated FFN bottleneck to Gemma's normalization-shielded circuit. In Qwen3.5-2B, ablating 20 neurons eliminates multi-turn sycophantic capitulation, while amplifying 10 related neurons improves factual correction from 52 percent to 88 percent on 200 TruthfulQA prompts. These results show that perturbation probing offers mechanistic insight into RLHF-organized behavior and a practical toolkit for precision template-layer editing.
title_zh: 扰动探测：一种针对对齐型大语言模型中前馈神经网络行为回路的每提示两次遍历诊断方法
abstract_zh: 扰动探测通过每条提示进行两次前向传播（无需反向传播），生成大语言模型中前馈神经网络（FFN）神经元的任务特异性因果假设，随后进行一次约150次前向传播的单次干预扫描，该扫描成本由所有识别出的神经元分摊。在八个行为回路、十三个模型及四个架构家族中，我们识别出两种组织LLM行为的电路结构：对抗性电路在强化学习人类反馈（RLHF）抑制预训练倾向时出现；在安全拒绝任务中，约50个神经元（占全部神经元的0.014%）控制拒绝模板，其消融可使520个AdvBench提示中的80%响应格式发生变化，同时仅导致3例（占520例的0.6%）有害合规，且均为带有免责声明的情况。路由电路则出现在注意力机制分布的预训练行为中。在语言选择任务中，对残差流方向注入的干预可使19个测试模型中满足三个观察条件的3个模型，在580个基准提示中将英文输出切换为中文输出，成功率高达99.1%——这些条件包括双语训练、FFN到跳过信号比介于0.3至1.1之间，以及线性可表示性。同一干预在其余16个模型以及数学、代码和事实类回路中均失效，从而界定了方向性调控的边界。FFN到跳过信号比（由相同的两次前向传播计算得出）能够区分这两种结构，并预测合适的干预方式。电路拓扑结构随架构而异，从Qwen的集中式FFN瓶颈到Gemma的归一化保护型电路。在Qwen3.5-2B模型中，消融20个神经元可消除多轮对话中的奉承式屈服行为，而增强10个相关神经元则使TruthfulQA测试集上事实修正准确率从52%提升至88%（基于200个提示）。这些结果表明，扰动探测不仅为理解RLHF所组织的行为提供了机制性洞见，更提供了一套实用的精准模板层编辑工具。

title: Physical Foundation Models: Fixed hardware implementations of large-scale neural networks
authors: Logan G Wright, Tianyu Wang, Tatsuhiro Onodera, Peter L. McMahon
abstract: Foundation models are deep neural networks (such as GPT-5, Gemini~3, and Opus~4) trained on large datasets that can perform diverse downstream tasks -- text and code generation, question answering, summarization, image classification, and so on. The philosophy of foundation models is to put effort into a single, large (${\sim}10^{12}$-parameter) general-purpose model that can be adapted to many downstream tasks with no or minimal additional training. We argue that the rise of foundation models presents an opportunity for hardware engineers: in contrast to when different models were used for different tasks, it now makes sense to build special-purpose, fixed hardware implementations of neural networks, manufactured and released at the roughly 1-year cadence of major new foundation-model versions. Beyond conventional digital-electronic inference hardware with read-only weight memory, we advocate a more radical re-thinking: hardware in which the neural network is realized directly at the level of the physical design and operates via the hardware's natural physical dynamics -- \textit{Physical Foundation Models} (PFMs). PFMs could enable orders-of-magnitude advantages in energy efficiency, speed, and parameter density. For ${\sim}10^{12}$-parameter models, this would both reduce the high energy burden of AI in datacenters and enable AI in edge devices that today are power-constrained to far smaller models. PFMs could also enable inference hardware for models much larger than current ones: $10^{15}$- or even $10^{18}$-parameter PFMs seem plausible by some measures. We present back-of-the-envelope calculations illustrating PFM scaling using an optical example -- a 3D nanostructured glass medium -- and discuss prospects in nanoelectronics and other physical platforms. We conclude with the major research challenges that must be resolved for trillion-parameter PFMs and beyond to become reality.
title_zh: 物理基础模型：大规模神经网络的固定硬件实现
abstract_zh: 基础模型是通过大规模数据集训练的深度神经网络（如 GPT-5、Gemini~3 和 Opus~4），能够执行多种下游任务——包括文本与代码生成、问答、摘要、图像分类等。基础模型的核心理念在于：投入大量资源构建一个单一的、通用的大规模模型（参数量约为 $10^{12}$ 量级），该模型可通过极少甚至无需额外训练，即可适配众多具体应用任务。我们认为，基础模型的兴起为硬件工程师带来了前所未有的机遇：与过去针对不同任务使用不同模型的情况不同，如今我们完全有理由设计专用的、固定的硬件实现方案来部署神经网络，并按照主要新基础模型版本约每年发布一次的节奏进行制造和推出。除了传统的以只读权重存储为特征的数字电子推理硬件外，我们更倡导一种更具颠覆性的思考方式：将神经网络直接在物理层面进行实现，并利用硬件自身的自然物理动态完成计算——即“物理基础模型”（Physical Foundation Models, PFMs）。PFMs 有望在能效、速度和参数密度方面实现数量级的提升。对于参数量约为 $10^{12}$ 的模型而言，这不仅能显著降低数据中心中人工智能带来的高能耗负担，还能使当前受功耗限制的边缘设备运行远超现有能力的智能模型。此外，PFMs 还可能支持远超当前规模的模型推理硬件：据某些估算，$10^{15}$ 乃至 $10^{18}$ 参数量级的 PFM 也具备实现的可能性。本文通过一个光学示例（三维纳米结构玻璃介质）进行了粗略的量级分析，展示了 PFM 的可扩展性，并探讨了在纳米电子学及其他物理平台上的发展前景。最后，我们总结了实现万亿参数级及更大规模 PFM 所必须攻克的重大科研挑战。

title: In-Context Prompting Obsoletes Agent Orchestration for Procedural Tasks
authors: Simon Dennis, Michael Diamond, Rivaan Patil, Kevin Shabahang, Hao Guo
abstract: Agent orchestration frameworks -- LangGraph, CrewAI, Google ADK, OpenAI Agents SDK, and others -- place an external orchestrator above the LLM, tracking state and injecting routing instructions at every turn. We present a controlled comparison showing that for procedural tasks, this architecture is dominated by a simpler alternative: putting the entire procedure in the system prompt and letting the model self-orchestrate. Across three domains -- travel booking (14 nodes), Zoom technical support (14 nodes), and insurance claims processing (55 nodes) -- we evaluate 200 conversations per condition using LLM-as-judge scoring on five quality criteria. The in-context approach scores 4.53--5.00 on a 5-point scale while a LangGraph orchestrator using the same model scores 4.17--4.84. The orchestrated system fails on 24% of travel, 9% of Zoom, and 17% of insurance conversations, compared to 11.5%, 0.5%, and 5% for the in-context baseline. While external orchestration may have been necessary for earlier models, advances in frontier model capabilities have made it unnecessary for multi-turn conversations following a defined procedure.
title_zh: 上下文提示取代了过程性任务中的智能体编排
abstract_zh: 代理编排框架——如 LangGraph、CrewAI、Google ADK、OpenAI Agents SDK 等——在大语言模型（LLM）之上引入了一个外部编排器，用于跟踪状态并在每一轮对话中注入路由指令。我们通过一项受控对比研究发现，对于流程性任务而言，这种架构已被一种更简单的替代方案所超越：将整个流程直接写入系统提示（system prompt），让模型自行完成编排。我们在三个领域——旅行预订（14个节点）、Zoom 技术支持（14个节点）和保险理赔处理（55个节点）——对每种方案进行了200次对话评估，采用 LLM 作为评判者，在五个质量维度上进行打分。结果显示，基于上下文的方案得分在 4.53 至 5.00 之间（满分5分），而使用相同模型的 LangGraph 编排系统得分仅为 4.17 至 4.84。在失败率方面，编排系统在旅行预订任务中失败率达24%，Zoom 支持为9%，保险理赔为17%；相比之下，基于上下文的基线方案失败率分别为11.5%、0.5% 和 5%。尽管早期模型可能确实需要外部编排，但随着前沿模型能力的显著提升，如今在遵循既定流程的多轮对话中，外部编排已不再必要。

title: ObjectGraph: From Document Injection to Knowledge Traversal -- A Native File Format for the Agentic Era
authors: Mohit Dubey, Open Gigantic
abstract: Every document format in existence was designed for a human reader moving linearly through text. Autonomous LLM agents do not read - they retrieve. This fundamental mismatch forces agents to inject entire documents into their context window, wasting tokens on irrelevant content, compounding state across multi-turn loops, and broadcasting information indiscriminately across agent roles. We argue this is not a prompt engineering problem, not a retrieval problem, and not a compression problem: it is a format problem. We introduce OBJECTGRAPH (.og), a file format that reconceives the document as a typed, directed knowledge graph to be traversed rather than a string to be injected. OBJECTGRAPH is a strict superset of Markdown - every .md file is a valid .og file - requires no infrastructure beyond a two-primitive query protocol, and is readable by both humans and agents without tooling. We formalize the Document Consumption Problem, characterise six structural properties no existing format satisfies simultaneously, and prove OBJECTGRAPH satisfies all six. We further introduce the Progressive Disclosure Model, the Role-Scoped Access Protocol, and Executable Assertion Nodes as native format primitives. Empirical evaluation across five document classes and eight agent task types demonstrates up to 95.3 percent token reduction with no statistically significant degradation in task accuracy (p > 0.05). Transpiler fidelity reaches 98.7 percent content preservation on a held-out document benchmark.
title_zh: 对象图：从文档注入到知识遍历——智能代理时代的原生文件格式
abstract_zh: 现存的每一种文档格式都是为人类读者线性阅读文本而设计的。自主的大语言模型（LLM）代理并不“阅读”——它们是“检索”。这种根本性的不匹配迫使代理将整个文档注入其上下文窗口，导致大量无关内容占用令牌，加剧多轮对话中的状态累积，并在不同代理角色间无差别地广播信息。我们认为，这并非提示工程问题，也非检索问题或压缩问题：这是一个格式问题。我们提出 OBJECTGRAPH（.og）文件格式，将文档重新构想为一种有类型、有向的知识图谱，供代理遍历而非注入的字符串。OBJECTGRAPH 是 Markdown 的严格超集——所有 .md 文件都是有效的 .og 文件——仅需一个由两个基本原语构成的查询协议，无需额外基础设施，且对人类和代理均无需工具即可直接读取。我们正式定义了“文档消费问题”，归纳出六项现有格式无法同时满足的结构特性，并证明 OBJECTGRAPH 完全满足这六项要求。此外，我们引入了渐进披露模型（Progressive Disclosure Model）、角色作用域访问协议（Role-Scoped Access Protocol）以及可执行断言节点（Executable Assertion Nodes）作为原生格式原语。在五类文档和八种代理任务上的实证评估表明，OBJECTGRAPH 可实现高达 95.3% 的令牌减少，且任务准确率无统计学显著下降（p > 0.05）。在保留文档基准测试中，转换器（Transpiler）的内容保真度达到 98.7%。

title: RuC: HDL-Agnostic Rule Completion Benchmark Generation
authors: Arnau Ayguadé Domingo, Miquel Alberti-Binimelis, Cristian Gutierrez-Gomez, Emanuele Parisi, Razine Moundir Ghorab, Miquel Moreto, Gokcen Kestor, Dario Garcia-Gasulla
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have rapidly improved in performance across code-related tasks, making their integration into Register Transfer Level (RTL) development increasingly attractive. Mimicking the behavior of inline code assistants, many benchmarks evaluate LLMs' capabilities in code completion, either assessing the generation of entire hardware modules or the completion of a single line within a module. However both of these approaches lack the ability to control the granularity of the code-completion sample size and the syntactic range of completions. To overcome these limitations, we present a framework for language-agnostic rule completion (RuC), a grammar-driven, rule-selectable benchmark generator that automatically produces RTL code-completion tasks from a set of input hardware description sources. RuC uses the target Hardware Description Language (HDL) grammar to mask syntactically defined code regions and prompts a model to regenerate them using the surrounding unmasked code as context, enabling a controlled and scalable evaluation of the domain-specific model's code-understanding capabilities, ranging from assignments to the reconstruction of entire logic blocks. We use RuC to generate two SystemVerilog rule-completion benchmarks from the Tiny Tapeout shuttle TT07 and the CVE2 RISC-V core to demonstrate RuC's applicability to a broad range of designs, and conduct a comparative study of the code completion capabilities of modern open-source LLMs across diverse settings. Results indicate that completion performance strongly depends on the model type, the grammatical structure of the masked region, and the prompting strategy. Specifically, the highest scores are obtained with Fill-in-the-Middle (FIM) prompting. These findings highlight the value of grammar-driven, arbitrarily granular benchmarks for meaningful evaluation of LLM capabilities in RTL development workflows.
title_zh: RuC：HDL无关规则补全基准数据集生成
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在代码相关任务中的性能迅速提升，使其在寄存器传输级（RTL）开发中的集成日益具有吸引力。目前，许多基准测试模仿内联代码助手的行为，评估LLM在代码补全方面的能力，或评估整个硬件模块的生成，或仅完成模块内的单行代码。然而，这两种方法均无法控制代码补全样本的粒度以及补全内容的语法范围。为克服这些局限性，我们提出了一种语言无关的规则补全框架（RuC），这是一种基于语法驱动、可选择规则的基准生成器，能够从一组输入的硬件描述源自动生成RTL代码补全任务。RuC利用目标硬件描述语言（HDL）的语法，对语义上定义的代码区域进行掩码，并以周围未掩码的代码作为上下文，引导模型重新生成被掩码的部分，从而实现对领域特定模型代码理解能力的可控且可扩展的评估，涵盖从赋值语句到完整逻辑块重建的多种粒度。我们使用RuC从Tiny Tapeout Shuttle TT07和CVE2 RISC-V核心中生成了两个SystemVerilog规则补全基准，展示了RuC在广泛设计中的适用性，并对现代开源LLM在不同场景下的代码补全能力进行了对比研究。结果表明，补全性能强烈依赖于模型类型、被掩码区域的语法结构以及提示策略。具体而言，采用“填空中间”（Fill-in-the-Middle, FIM）提示策略时获得最高得分。这些发现凸显了基于语法驱动、任意粒度的基准在有意义评估LLM在RTL开发工作流中能力方面的价值。

title: LLM-as-a-Judge for Human-AI Co-Creation: A Reliability-Aware Evaluation Framework for Coding
authors: Md Faizul Ibne Amin, Yutaka Watanobe, Daniel M. Muepu, Haruto Suzuki, Kenta Nanaumi, Md Mostafizer Rahman
abstract: LLMs are increasingly employed both as judges for evaluating open-ended outputs and as co-creation partners in AI-assisted programming; yet rigorous evaluation in human-AI co-creation settings remains underdeveloped as judgments must be reliable, comparable across models, and interpretable over multi-turn interaction. To address this gap, a rubric-driven LLM-as-a-Judge framework is presented for contest-style human-AI co-creation in coding and software engineering (SE). The framework is built around schema-constrained judge outputs, validation and repair mechanisms, grouped and split by user and problem to prevent trajectory leakage, and participant-level NONBLIND context. Multiple LLM judges are assessed through a multi-metric protocol covering discrimination (ROC-AUC, PR-AUC), thresholded decision quality (MCC), probabilistic reliability (LogLoss, Brier score, ECE), and inter-judge agreement (Cohen's and Fleiss' k). Human-AI co-creation is further examined through trajectory-level signals, including turn-wise confidence, Success-at-Turn, time-to-success, revision churn, and CodeBLEU. Co-creation success is found to concentrate early, with Success-at-Turn rising to 0.8533 at the first observed turn and stabilizing at 0.8641 by turn 6. Revision behavior, however, remains heterogeneous, suggesting that productive progress can emerge through either incremental refinement or broader restructuring. On the judging side, the best held-out scores reach 0.5937 for ROC-AUC, 0.6904 for PR-AUC, and 0.5000 for MCC test, while inter-judge consistency remains modest overall (mean pairwise Cohen's k = 0.1592, Fleiss' k = 0.0696). Taken together, this work offers an auditable and reproducible evaluation methodology that links reliability-aware LLM judging with trajectory-based analysis of human-AI co-creation, providing a practical evaluation template for future AI-assisted coding and SE.
title_zh: 基于大模型作为评判者的生成式人机协同创作：一种可靠性感知的代码评估框架
abstract_zh:
大型语言模型（LLMs）在评估开放式输出以及作为人工智能辅助编程中的协同创作伙伴方面正日益得到应用；然而，人类与AI协同创作环境中的严谨评估仍显不足，因为评判必须具备可靠性、跨模型可比性，并且在多轮交互中具有可解释性。为弥补这一空白，本文提出一种基于评分量表的“LLM作为裁判”框架，用于编码与软件工程（SE）领域的竞赛式人机协同创作。该框架以结构化约束的裁判输出为核心，结合验证与修复机制，按用户和问题分组并拆分数据，以防止创作轨迹泄露，并引入参与者级别的非盲态上下文信息。通过涵盖判别能力（ROC-AUC、PR-AUC）、阈值决策质量（MCC）、概率可靠性（LogLoss、Brier得分、ECE）以及裁判间一致性（Cohen's k 和 Fleiss' k）的多指标协议，对多个LLM裁判进行了系统评估。

此外，研究还通过轨迹级信号深入分析了人机协同创作过程，包括逐轮置信度、成功达成率（Success-at-Turn）、达成成功所需时间、修改频次（revision churn）以及CodeBLEU等指标。结果发现，协同创作的成功高度集中在早期阶段：首次可观测轮次的成功率达到0.8533，并在第6轮稳定至0.8641。然而，修改行为表现出显著异质性，表明有效进展既可通过渐进式优化实现，也可通过更广泛的重构达成。

在裁判表现方面，最佳保留测试得分达到ROC-AUC 0.5937、PR-AUC 0.6904、MCC 0.5000；但裁判间一致性整体仍较弱（平均成对Cohen's k = 0.1592，Fleiss' k = 0.0696）。综上所述，本研究提供了一种可审计、可复现的评估方法，将注重可靠性的LLM裁判机制与基于创作轨迹的分析相结合，为人机协同编程与软件工程领域未来的研究提供了实用的评估范式。

title: How Code Representation Shapes False-Positive Dynamics in Cross-Language LLM Vulnerability Detection
authors: Maofei Chen, Laifu Wang, Yue Qin, Yuan Wang, Bo Wu, Dongxin Liu
abstract: How code representation format shapes false positive behaviour in cross-language LLM vulnerability detection remains poorly understood. We systematically vary training intensity and code representation format, comparing raw source text with pruned Abstract Syntax Trees at both training time and inference time, across two 8B-parameter LLMs (Qwen3-8B and Llama 3.1-8B-Instruct) fine-tuned on C/C++ data from the NIST Juliet Test Suite (v1.3) and evaluated on Java (OWASP Benchmark v1.2) and Python (BenchmarkPython v0.1). Cross-language FPR reflects the joint effect of training-time and inference-time representation, not either alone. Text fine-tuning drives FPR upward monotonically (Qwen3-8B: 0.763 zero-shot, 0.866 pilot, 1.000 full-scale) while F1 remains stable (0.637-0.688), masking the collapse. We argue surface-cue memorisation is the primary mechanism: text fine-tuning encodes C/C++-specific API names and syntactic idioms as vulnerability triggers that fire indiscriminately on target-language code. A cross-representation probe, applying text-trained weights to AST-encoded input without retraining, isolates this: Qwen3-8B FPR drops from 0.866 to 0.583, and 37.2% of false positives revert to true negatives under AST input alone. Direct AST fine-tuning does not preserve the benefit (FPR at least 0.970), as flat linearisation introduces structural surface cues of its own. The pattern replicates across both model families. On BenchmarkPython the AST probe yields FPR=0.554, within 2.9 percentage points of the Java result, despite maximal surface-syntax differences, substantially weakening a domain-shift explanation. These findings motivate a pre-deployment consistency gate, running alerts through both text and AST paths, as a retraining-free filter for false-positive-sensitive settings, at the cost of reduced recall.
title_zh: 代码表示如何影响跨语言大模型漏洞检测中的误报动态
abstract_zh:
代码表示格式如何影响跨语言大模型漏洞检测中的误报行为，目前仍缺乏深入理解。我们系统性地调整了训练强度与代码表示形式，在训练和推理两个阶段分别比较原始源代码文本与剪枝后的抽象语法树（AST），针对两个80亿参数的大语言模型（Qwen3-8B 和 Llama 3.1-8B-Instruct）进行实验。这些模型均在来自NIST Juliet测试套件（v1.3）的C/C++数据上进行了微调，并在Java（OWASP Benchmark v1.2）和Python（BenchmarkPython v0.1）上进行评估。

跨语言误报率（FPR）反映了训练时与推理时代码表示方式的联合效应，而非任一单独因素所致。以文本形式进行微调会单调地推高误报率（Qwen3-8B：零样本时为0.763，试点训练时为0.866，全规模训练时达1.000），而F1分数则保持相对稳定（0.637–0.688），从而掩盖了性能的实质性退化。我们认为，表面线索记忆是主要机制：文本微调将C/C++特有的API名称和语法惯用法编码为漏洞触发信号，导致其在目标语言代码中无差别激活。通过一项跨表示探针实验——在不重新训练的前提下，将文本训练所得权重应用于AST编码输入——我们得以隔离该现象：Qwen3-8B的FPR从0.866降至0.583，且有37.2%的误报在仅使用AST输入时转为真负例。

直接对AST进行微调并未保留这一优势（FPR至少为0.970），因为扁平化的线性化过程引入了自身的结构表面线索。该模式在两种模型家族中均重复出现。在BenchmarkPython上，AST探针实现的FPR为0.554，与Java结果相差仅2.9个百分点，尽管两者在表面语法上差异极大，这显著削弱了“领域偏移”作为解释的合理性。

上述发现提示我们应在部署前引入一致性校验机制：将警报同时通过文本路径与AST路径运行，作为一种无需重训练的过滤手段，适用于对误报敏感的应用场景，代价是召回率有所下降。

title: Knowledge Graph Representations for LLM-Based Policy Compliance Reasoning
authors: Wilder Baldwin, Sepideh Ghanavati
abstract: The risks posed by AI features are increasing as they are rapidly integrated into software applications. In response, regulations and standards for safe and secure AI have been proposed. In this paper, we present an agentic framework that constructs knowledge graphs (KGs) from AI policy documents and retrieves policy-relevant information to answer questions. We build KGs from three AI risk-related polices under two ontology schemas, and then evaluate five LLMs on 42 policy QA tasks spanning six reasoning types, from entity lookup to cross-policy inference, using both heuristic scoring and an LLM-as-judge. KG augmentation improves scores for all five models, and an open, LLM-discovered schema matches or exceeds the formal ontology.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的政策合规性推理的知识图谱表示
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能功能被快速融入软件应用，其所带来的风险也在不断加剧。为此，相关安全与可信AI的法规和标准已相继提出。本文提出一种代理式框架，该框架从AI政策文件中构建知识图谱（KG），并检索与政策相关的信息以回答问题。我们基于两种本体模式，从三份与AI风险相关的政策文件中构建知识图谱，并在涵盖六种推理类型（从实体查找到跨政策推理）的42个政策问答任务上，对五种大语言模型（LLMs）进行了评估，采用启发式评分和“大模型作为评判者”两种方法。结果表明，知识图谱的增强显著提升了所有五种模型的表现，而由大模型自主发现的开放性本体模式，在性能上达到甚至超过了正式的本体结构。

title: Understanding Bugs in Template Engine-Based Applications: Symptoms, Root Causes, and Fix Patterns
authors: Kai Gao, Yu Sun, Chang-ai Sun
abstract: Template engines are indispensable components in modern software ecosystems, enabling the generation of structured documents and scripts across domains such as web development, Infrastructure as Code, and data engineering. However, the unique architectural characteristics of template engine-based applications (i.e., TE applications), including multi-language composition, opaque data flow, deferred validation, and complex integration, pose significant challenges for diagnosing and resolving bugs in TE applications. While prior research has primarily focused on template engine security, bugs in TE applications remain under-investigated. To bridge this gap, we present the first comprehensive study of TE application bugs. By analyzing 1,004 application bugs across 15 template engines in five programming languages, we identify the symptoms and root causes of TE application bugs and common patterns to fix them. Our findings reveal that Abnormal Rendering Result (e.g., unexpected or blank output) is the most prevalent symptom (48.61%), often manifesting as silent failures that are difficult to diagnose. We identify 17 root causes, with Syntax Misuse, Mismatched Data Context, and Incompatible Integration as the dominant categories. Furthermore, we find that while 67.92% of the bugs are fixed within the template, over 20% require modifications in the host-side logic to resolve data context issues. Based on these findings, we derive actionable implications for tool designers, practitioners, and researchers. To demonstrate the practical utility of our findings, we further develop two prototype tools for the Jinja engine to facilitate the development and debugging of TE applications.
title_zh: 模板引擎应用中的漏洞理解：症状、根本原因及修复模式
abstract_zh: 模板引擎是现代软件生态系统中不可或缺的组成部分，能够跨多个领域（如Web开发、基础设施即代码和数据工程）生成结构化文档和脚本。然而，基于模板引擎的应用程序（即TE应用程序）具有独特的架构特性，包括多语言混合、数据流不透明、延迟验证以及复杂的集成方式，这些特性给TE应用程序中的错误诊断与修复带来了重大挑战。尽管以往研究主要关注模板引擎的安全性问题，但对TE应用程序中的缺陷却鲜有深入探讨。为填补这一空白，我们首次开展了对TE应用程序缺陷的全面研究。通过对五种编程语言中15个模板引擎所涉及的1,004个应用缺陷进行分析，我们识别出TE应用程序缺陷的症状、根本原因以及常见的修复模式。研究发现，异常渲染结果（如意外输出或空白输出）是最普遍的症状（占比48.61%），且常表现为难以察觉的静默失败。我们共识别出17类根本原因，其中语法误用、数据上下文不匹配以及集成不兼容是主要类别。此外，我们发现虽然67.92%的缺陷可在模板内部修复，但超过20%的问题需要修改宿主端逻辑以解决数据上下文问题。基于上述发现，我们为工具设计者、实践者及研究人员提出了可操作的启示。为进一步验证研究成果的实际价值，我们还针对Jinja模板引擎开发了两个原型工具，旨在提升TE应用程序的开发与调试效率。

title: PuzzleMark: Implicit Jigsaw Learning for Robust Code Dataset Watermarking in Neural Code Completion Models
authors: Haocheng Huang, Yuchen Chen, Weisong Sun, Peizhuo Lv, Yuan Xiao, Chunrong Fang, Yang Liu, Xiaofang Zhang
abstract: Constructing and curating high-quality code datasets requires significant resources, making them valuable intellectual property. Unfortunately, these datasets currently face severe risks of unauthorized use. Although digital watermarking offers a post hoc mechanism for copyright authentication, existing methods are predominantly based on the co-occurrence pattern, which is not robust and is susceptible to watermark detection and removal attacks. In this paper, we propose PuzzleMark, a robust watermarking method for code datasets. To reduce the risk of watermark exposure, PuzzleMark introduces a carrier selection strategy that leverages code complexity to evaluate the suitability of code snippets as watermark carriers, and selects those with high suitability for watermarking. To enhance the robustness of the watermark, PuzzleMark proposes a novel concatenation pattern to replace the traditional co-occurrence pattern, and implements two watermarking strategies through variable name concatenation. PuzzleMark adaptively embeds watermarks based on the inherent characteristics of the code, making it more stealthy while maintaining design simplicity. For watermark verification, PuzzleMark employs Fisher's exact test to verify suspicious models under a black-box setting. Experimental results demonstrate that PuzzleMark achieves a 100% verification success rate and a 0% false positive rate, with negligible impact on model performance. Both our human study and our evaluation using four state-of-the-art watermark detection methods show that PuzzleMark exhibits strong imperceptibility, with an average suspicious rate $\leq$ 0.24 and an average recall $\leq$ 30.41%, respectively. As a practical digital watermarking method, PuzzleMark provides strong protection for the intellectual property of code datasets and offers new insights for future research.
title_zh: PuzzleMark：用于神经代码补全模型中鲁棒代码数据集水印的隐式拼图学习
abstract_zh: 构建和整理高质量的代码数据集需要大量资源，因此这些数据集具有重要的知识产权价值。然而，目前这些数据集面临着严重的未经授权使用风险。尽管数字水印提供了一种事后版权认证机制，但现有方法大多基于共现模式，其鲁棒性较差，容易受到水印检测与移除攻击。本文提出了一种名为PuzzleMark的鲁棒代码数据集水印方法。为降低水印暴露的风险，PuzzleMark引入了一种载体选择策略，利用代码复杂度评估代码片段作为水印载体的适用性，并选择适用性高的片段进行水印嵌入。为增强水印的鲁棒性，PuzzleMark提出一种新型拼接模式，替代传统的共现模式，并通过变量名拼接实现两种水印嵌入策略。PuzzleMark根据代码固有特征自适应地嵌入水印，在保持设计简洁的同时提升了隐蔽性。在水印验证方面，PuzzleMark采用Fisher精确检验法，在黑盒环境下验证可疑模型。实验结果表明，PuzzleMark实现了100%的验证成功率和0%的误报率，对模型性能的影响微乎其微。无论是人工评估，还是使用四种最先进的水印检测方法进行评估，PuzzleMark均表现出极强的不可感知性，平均可疑率≤0.24，平均召回率≤30.41%。作为一种实用的数字水印方法，PuzzleMark为代码数据集的知识产权提供了强有力的保护，并为未来研究提供了新的思路。

title: From Context to Skills: Can Language Models Learn from Context Skillfully?
authors: Shuzheng Si, Haozhe Zhao, Yu Lei, Qingyi Wang, Dingwei Chen, Zhitong Wang, Zhenhailong Wang, Kangyang Luo, Zheng Wang, Gang Chen, Fanchao Qi, Minjia Zhang, Maosong Sun
abstract: Many real-world tasks require language models (LMs) to reason over complex contexts that exceed their parametric knowledge. This calls for context learning, where LMs directly learn relevant knowledge from the given context. An intuitive solution is inference-time skill augmentation: extracting the rules and procedures from context into natural-language skills. However, constructing such skills for context learning scenarios faces two challenges: the prohibitive cost of manual skill annotation for long, technically dense contexts, and the lack of external feedback for automated skill construction, since there is no automatic signal to tell whether a proposed skill is helpful. In this paper, we propose Ctx2Skill, a self-evolving framework that autonomously discovers, refines, and selects context-specific skills without human supervision or external feedback. At its core, a multi-agent self-play loop has a Challenger that generates probing tasks and rubrics, a Reasoner that attempts to solve them guided by an evolving skill set, and a neutral Judge that provides binary feedback. Crucially, both the Challenger and the Reasoner evolve through accumulated skills: dedicated Proposer and Generator agents analyze failure cases and synthesize them into targeted skill updates for both sides, enabling automated skill discovery and refinement. To prevent adversarial collapse caused by increasingly extreme task generation and over-specialized skill accumulation, we further introduce a Cross-time Replay mechanism that identifies the skill set achieving the best balance across representative cases for the Reasoner side, ensuring robust and generalizable skill evolution. The resulting skills can be plugged into any language model to obtain better context learning capability. Evaluated on four context learning tasks from CL-bench, Ctx2Skill consistently improves solving rates across backbone models.
title_zh: 从上下文到技能：语言模型能否巧妙地从上下文中学习？
abstract_zh:
许多现实世界任务要求语言模型（LM）在超出其参数化知识范围的复杂上下文中进行推理。这需要引入上下文学习机制，即让语言模型直接从给定的上下文中学到相关知识。一种直观的解决方案是推理时技能增强：将上下文中的规则和程序提取为自然语言形式的“技能”。然而，在上下文学习场景中构建此类技能面临两大挑战：一是对长篇且技术密集型上下文进行人工技能标注成本过高；二是缺乏外部反馈来支持自动化技能构建，因为没有自动信号可以判断所提出的技能是否真正有用。

本文提出 Ctx2Skill，一个无需人工监督或外部反馈的自演化框架，能够自主发现、优化并选择与特定上下文相关的技能。该框架的核心是一个多智能体自博弈循环：一名“挑战者”生成探测性任务及其评分标准，一名“推理者”在不断演化的技能集指导下尝试解决问题，而一名中立的“裁判”则提供二元反馈（正确/错误）。关键在于，挑战者与推理者均通过积累的技能持续进化：专门的“提议者”和“生成者”智能体分析失败案例，并将其转化为针对双方的精准技能更新，从而实现技能的自动化发现与优化。

为进一步防止因任务生成日益极端以及技能过度专业化而导致的对抗性崩溃问题，我们还引入了一种跨时间回放机制（Cross-time Replay），该机制能识别出在代表性任务上为推理者带来最佳平衡表现的技能集合，确保技能演进具备鲁棒性和泛化能力。最终生成的技能可无缝集成至任意语言模型中，显著提升其上下文学习能力。

在 CL-bench 数据集上的四个上下文学习任务评估表明，Ctx2Skill 在不同主干模型上均稳定提升了问题求解率。

title: treVM: Tiny Rust Embedded Virtual Machines with WASM on Variable Resource-Constrained Hardware
authors: Antoine Lavandier, Bastien Buil, Chrystel Gaber, Emmanuel Baccelli
abstract: Software stacks embedded on microcontroller-based hardware typically provide rudimentary APIs programmed in C/C++, basic connectivity and, sometimes, a firmware update mechanism. Such coarse mechanisms contrast with widely used APIs and more advanced networked interaction expected from software stacks deployed on less resource-constrained hardware (microprocessor-based). In this paper, we aim to bridge this gap by designing treVM, a generic scheme to host high-level WebAssembly code capsules, bolted on a general-purpose Rust embedded software platform, able to run on a large variety of 32-bit microcontrollers. Not only can treVM capsules host highly customizable business logic, but capsules can also be securely updated on demand over the network, on devices already deployed in the field. We implement treVM in Rust, on top of Ariel OS, a general-purpose RTOS, and we publish the code as open source. Based on our implementation, we validate the feasibility of treVM on commonly available boards, and we report on extensive benchmarks we performed on heterogeneous hardware including Arm Cortex-M, RISC-V, and Xtensa microcontroller architectures. As such, treVM provides a promising new framework to secure continuous deployment of embedded software on low-power networked devices.
title_zh: treVM：在资源受限硬件上运行的微型Rust嵌入式虚拟机，支持WASM
