abstract_zh: 基于微控制器硬件的软件栈通常提供用 C/C++ 编写的简单 API，具备基本的连接能力，有时还包含固件更新机制。这些粗略的机制与在资源更充裕的硬件（如基于微处理器的设备）上部署的软件栈所期望的广泛使用 API 和更先进的网络交互能力形成鲜明对比。本文旨在通过设计 treVM 来弥合这一差距：treVM 是一种通用方案，可在通用 Rust 嵌入式软件平台之上运行高级 WebAssembly 代码胶囊，支持多种 32 位微控制器。treVM 胶囊不仅能够承载高度可定制的业务逻辑，还能在设备已部署于现场的情况下，通过网络按需安全地进行更新。我们以 Rust 语言实现 treVM，构建于 Ariel OS——一个通用实时操作系统（RTOS）之上，并将代码开源发布。基于我们的实现，我们在常见开发板上验证了 treVM 的可行性，并在包括 Arm Cortex-M、RISC-V 和 Xtensa 微控制器架构在内的异构硬件平台上进行了广泛的基准测试。因此，treVM 为低功耗联网设备上的嵌入式软件安全持续部署提供了一个极具前景的新框架。

title: CuLifter: Lifting GPU Binaries to Typed IR
authors: Jisheng Zhao, Huanzhi Pu, Shinnung Jeong, Chihyo Ahn, Hyesoon Kim
abstract: GPU compilers merge all data types into a single unified register file, erasing the type information that binary-analysis tools rely on. We show that type recovery from this untyped register file is the central challenge of GPU binary lifting. We present CuLifter, a SASS-to-LLVM IR lifting framework that recovers register types via constraint propagation with conflict detection, reconstructs explicit control flow, and aggregates multi-instruction patterns. Across eight benchmark suites (24,437 GPU functions in 919 cubins) spanning open-source applications, vendor libraries, and optimized ML runtimes, CuLifter successfully lifts 99.98% of functions to valid LLVM IR. An ablation study confirms that type recovery is the only step required to produce semantically correct IR: disabling it drops the x86 pass rate from 73.8% to 0%, a 73.8 percentage-point drop.
title_zh: CuLifter：将GPU二进制文件提升至带类型的中间表示
abstract_zh: GPU编译器将所有数据类型合并到一个统一的寄存器文件中，从而抹除了二进制分析工具所依赖的类型信息。我们表明，从这种无类型的寄存器文件中恢复类型，是GPU二进制提升的核心挑战。本文提出CuLifter，一个SASS到LLVM IR的提升框架，通过带冲突检测的约束传播来恢复寄存器类型，重构显式的控制流，并聚合多指令模式。在涵盖开源应用、厂商库和优化后的机器学习运行时的八个基准测试套件（共919个cubin文件中的24,437个GPU函数）上，CuLifter成功将99.98%的函数提升为有效的LLVM IR。消融实验确认，类型恢复是生成语义正确IR的唯一必要步骤：禁用该步骤后，x86目标代码的通过率从73.8%骤降至0%，下降了73.8个百分点。

title: ChipLingo: A Systematic Training Framework for Large Language Models in EDA
authors: Lei Li, Xingwen Yu, Jianguo Ni, Junxuan Zhu, Jieqiong Zhang, Jian Zhao, Zhi Liu
abstract: With the rapid advancement of semiconductor technology, Electronic Design Automation (EDA) has become an increasingly knowledge-intensive and document-driven engineering domain. Although large language models (LLMs) have shown strong general capabilities, applying them directly to EDA remains challenging due to limited domain expertise, cross-tool knowledge confusion, and degraded retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) performance after domain training. To address these issues, this paper presents ChipLingo, a systematic training pipeline for domain-adapted LLMs tailored to EDA scenarios. ChipLingo consists of three stages: domain corpus construction with multi-source data curation and QA augmentation, domain-adaptive pretraining with comparisons of different parameter training strategies, and instruction alignment with RAG scenario training under diverse retrieval conditions. We also curate an internal benchmark, EDA-Bench, covering representative EDA tool scenarios, with plans for public release. Experiments show that ChipLingo-8B achieves 59.7% accuracy on EDA-Bench, outperforming the same-scale base model and some larger general-purpose models. ChipLingo-32B reaches 70.02%, approaching leading closed-source commercial models. Further analysis shows that QA augmentation improves domain performance, Partial FT offers a better balance between adaptation and general capability retention than LoRA, and explicit RAG scenario training mitigates the decline in retrieval utilization after domain training. These results demonstrate the practical value of systematic domain training for knowledge-intensive EDA tasks and provide a foundation for future EDA agents and external-knowledge-driven systems.
title_zh: ChipLingo：面向电子设计自动化领域大语言模型的系统化训练框架
abstract_zh: 随着半导体技术的快速发展，电子设计自动化（EDA）已逐渐演变为一个知识密集且高度依赖文档的工程领域。尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）展现出强大的通用能力，但将其直接应用于EDA仍面临诸多挑战，包括领域专业知识有限、跨工具知识混淆，以及在领域训练后检索增强生成（RAG）性能下降等问题。为解决上述问题，本文提出ChipLingo——一种专为EDA场景量身定制的领域自适应大模型系统化训练流程。ChipLingo包含三个阶段：基于多源数据筛选与问答增强的领域语料构建、不同参数训练策略对比下的领域自适应预训练，以及在多种检索条件下进行RAG场景对齐的指令微调。此外，我们还构建了一个内部基准测试集EDA-Bench，涵盖典型的EDA工具应用场景，并计划后续公开发布。实验结果表明，ChipLingo-8B在EDA-Bench上达到59.7%的准确率，优于同规模的基础模型及部分更大规模的通用模型；而ChipLingo-32B更是达到了70.02%的水平，接近当前领先的闭源商业模型。进一步分析显示，问答增强显著提升了模型在领域的表现，部分微调（Partial FT）在领域适应性与通用能力保留之间取得了比LoRA更优的平衡，而显式地针对RAG场景进行训练有效缓解了领域训练后检索利用率下降的问题。这些成果充分证明了系统化领域训练在知识密集型EDA任务中的实际价值，并为未来EDA智能体及外部知识驱动系统的研发奠定了坚实基础。

title: Pragmos: A Process Agentic Modeling System
authors: Pedro-Aarón Hernández-Ávalos, Luciano García-Bañuelos
abstract: The advent of Large Language Models (LLMs) has significantly transformed tasks across Software Engineering. In the context of Business Process Management, LLMs are now being explored as tools to derive process models directly from textual descriptions. Existing approaches range from chatbot-driven systems that assist with iterative, text-based modeling to fully automated end-to-end modeling assistants. However, we argue that process modeling is inherently complex and cannot be effectively addressed through black-box solutions. Instead, we envision modeling as an open-ended conversational activity, best supported by an interactive, iterative process involving both humans and LLM. In our approach, the modeling task is decomposed into smaller, manageable steps. Each step results in intermediate artifacts and explicitly documents the rationale behind each modeling decision. During this process, we incrementally uncover simple behavioral relations that guide the construction of the model. Given the current limitations of LLMs in reasoning about complex dependencies, we complement them with specialized tools developed in the field to structure process models based on behavioral relations. This hybrid approach enables the generation of sound, yet comprehensible models that evolve through transparent and explainable steps. In this paper, we present our research agenda and introduce Pragmos, a prototype system that operationalizes this vision. Pragmos demonstrates how LLMs can collaborate with human users as both domain and modeling experts to co-create evolving process models through a structured and explainable workflow.
title_zh: 普拉格莫斯：一种过程代理建模系统
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）的出现已显著改变了软件工程领域的各项任务。在业务流程管理领域，LLMs 正被探索作为直接从文本描述中提取流程模型的工具。现有的方法涵盖了由聊天机器人驱动的系统，这些系统通过迭代式的文本建模提供辅助，也包括完全自动化的端到端建模助手。然而，我们认为流程建模本质上具有复杂性，无法通过“黑箱”式解决方案有效应对。相反，我们设想建模是一个开放式的对话过程，最适宜由人类与 LLM 以交互式、迭代式的方式共同完成。在我们的方法中，建模任务被分解为若干小而可管理的步骤，每一步都生成中间成果，并明确记录每个建模决策背后的逻辑依据。在此过程中，我们逐步揭示出简单的行为关系，从而指导模型的构建。鉴于当前 LLM 在处理复杂依赖关系方面的局限性，我们结合了该领域内专门开发的工具，基于行为关系对流程模型进行结构化组织。这种混合方法能够生成既合理又易于理解的模型，且其演化过程透明、可解释。本文提出了我们的研究愿景，并介绍了 Pragmos——一个实现这一理念的原型系统。Pragmos 展示了 LLM 如何与人类用户（兼具领域专家和建模专家身份）协作，通过结构化且可解释的工作流共同创建不断演进的流程模型。

title: Static Attribution of Android Residential Proxy Malware Using Graph Kernels
authors: Peter Clark, Yong Guan, Zhonghao Liao
abstract: Android residential proxy applications represent a growing class of potentially-unwanted programs (PUPs) that covertly route third-party traffic through end-user devices, enabling ad fraud, credential abuse, and evasion of geolocation controls by sophisticated threat actors. Attributing an unknown APK to a specific proxy network remains challenging due to code reuse, SDK embedding, and obfuscation across proxy families. We present a static-analysis pipeline for automated proxyware family attribution, extracting graph-structured representations (control-flow and function-call graphs) and behavioral signatures from a labeled corpus of 3,365 Android proxy apps spanning four commercial proxy networks. We evaluate Weisfeiler-Lehman graph kernel features alone and fused with binary capability vectors across multiple classifiers. Using 5-fold DEX-grouped cross-validation to prevent data leakage, SGD achieves a macro F1 of 0.985 on the expanded dataset. To support explainability, we map classifier decisions to automatically generated Yara rules, achieving per-family accuracies up to 88.45\% after filtering non-discriminative signatures. Finally, we discuss these results in the context of the broader ecosystem. We find that from the expanded dataset, the majority of applications (51.4\%) still available through APKPure still contain embedded proxy SDK code. Further analysis of developer accounts reveals that 23 developers are responsible for other applications also containing such functionality, suggesting continuous and ongoing commercial relationships between proxy providers and developers.
title_zh: 基于图核的Android住宅代理恶意软件静态归因
abstract_zh: Android 住宅代理应用代表了一类日益增长的潜在不受欢迎程序（PUPs），这些程序在未经用户知情的情况下，将第三方流量通过终端用户的设备进行中转，使高级威胁行为者能够实施广告欺诈、凭据滥用，并规避地理位置控制。由于不同代理家族之间存在代码复用、SDK 嵌入以及混淆技术，因此将未知 APK 文件归因于特定代理网络仍面临巨大挑战。本文提出一种基于静态分析的自动化代理软件家族归属方法，从包含3,365个Android代理应用的标注数据集（涵盖四个商业代理网络）中提取图结构表示（控制流图与函数调用图）和行为特征签名。我们评估了仅使用 Weisfeiler-Lehman 图核特征，以及将其与二进制能力向量融合后在多种分类器上的表现。采用五折 DEX 分组交叉验证以防止数据泄露，结果显示随机梯度下降（SGD）分类器在扩展数据集上达到了0.985的宏平均F1分数。为增强可解释性，我们将分类器决策映射至自动生成的 Yara 规则，经过筛选非区分性签名后，各家族的识别准确率最高可达88.45%。最后，我们在更广泛的生态系统背景下讨论上述结果：分析发现，在扩展数据集中仍有51.4%的应用程序（仍可通过 APKPure 获取）包含嵌入式代理 SDK 代码；进一步对开发者账户的分析表明，有23名开发者曾发布其他同样具备此类功能的应用，暗示代理服务提供商与开发者之间存在持续且长期的商业合作关系。

title: Characterizing the Consistency of the Emergent Misalignment Persona
authors: Anietta Weckauff, Yuchen Zhang, Maksym Andriushchenko
abstract: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) on narrowly misaligned data generalizes to broadly misaligned behavior, a phenomenon termed emergent misalignment (EM). While prior work has found a correlation between harmful behavior and self-assessment in emergently misaligned models, it remains unclear how consistent this correspondence is across tasks and whether it varies across fine-tuning domains. We characterize the consistency of the EM persona by fine-tuning Qwen 2.5 32B Instruct on six narrowly misaligned domains (e.g., insecure code, risky financial advice, bad medical advice) and administering experiments including harmfulness evaluation, self-assessment, choosing between two descriptions of AI systems, output recognition, and score prediction. Our results reveal two distinct patterns: coherent-persona models, in which harmful behavior and self-reported misalignment are coupled, and inverted-persona models, which produce harmful outputs while identifying as aligned AI systems. These findings reveal a more fine-grained picture of the effects of emergent misalignment, calling into question the consistency of the EM persona.
title_zh: 描述涌现错位人格的一致性
abstract_zh: 在狭义偏差数据上微调大型语言模型（LLMs）会导致其产生广泛偏差的行为，这一现象被称为“涌现性偏差”（Emergent Misalignment, EM）。尽管先前的研究发现，在涌现性偏差模型中，有害行为与自我评估之间存在相关性，但这种对应关系在不同任务间是否一致，以及在不同微调领域是否存在差异，仍不明确。我们通过在六个狭义偏差领域（如不安全代码、高风险金融建议、不当医疗建议等）对Qwen 2.5 32B Instruct模型进行微调，并开展了一系列实验，包括有害性评估、自我评估、在两个AI系统描述间进行选择、输出识别以及评分预测。研究结果揭示出两种截然不同的模式：一种是“一致人格型”模型，其有害行为与自我报告的偏差高度关联；另一种是“反向人格型”模型，它们生成有害内容，却自我宣称是符合对齐标准的AI系统。这些发现揭示了涌现性偏差影响的更精细图景，也对EM人格的一致性提出了质疑。

title: Secret Stealing Attacks on Local LLM Fine-Tuning through Supply-Chain Model Code Backdoors
authors: Zi Li, Tian Zhou, Wenze Li, Jingyu Hua, Yunlong Mao, Sheng Zhong
abstract: Local fine-tuning datasets routinely contain sensitive secrets such as API keys, personal identifiers, and financial records. Although ''local offline fine-tuning'' is often viewed as a privacy boundary, we reveal that compromised model code is sufficient to steal them. Current passive pretrained-weight poisoning attacks, while effective for natural language, fundamentally fail to capture such sparse high-entropy targets due to their reliance on probabilistic semantic prefixes. To bridge this gap, we identify and exploit a practical but overlooked supply-chain vector -- model code camouflaged as standard architectural definitions -- to realize a paradigm shift from passive weight poisoning to active execution hijacking. We introduce a deterministic full-chain memorization mechanism: it locks onto token-level secrets in dynamic computation flows via online tensor-rule matching, and leverages value-gradient decoupling to stealthily inject attack gradients, overcoming gradient drowning to force model memorization. Furthermore, we achieve, for the first time, attacker-verifiable secret stealing through black-box queries that precisely distinguishes true leakage from hallucination. Experiments demonstrate that our method achieves over 98\% Strict ASR without compromising the primary task, and can effectively bypass defense measures including DP-SGD, semantic auditing, and code auditing.
title_zh: 通过供应链模型代码后门对本地大语言模型微调的隐蔽窃取攻击
abstract_zh: 本地微调数据集通常包含敏感信息，如API密钥、个人身份标识符和财务记录。尽管“本地离线微调”常被视为隐私保护的边界，但我们揭示：仅需泄露模型代码，攻击者即可窃取这些敏感信息。当前的被动预训练权重污染攻击虽然在自然语言任务中表现有效，但因依赖概率语义前缀，根本无法捕捉此类稀疏且高熵的目标。为填补这一空白，我们发现并利用了一个实际却长期被忽视的供应链攻击向量——将恶意模型代码伪装成标准架构定义，从而实现从被动权重污染到主动执行劫持的范式转变。我们提出一种确定性的全链路记忆机制：通过在线张量规则匹配，在动态计算流中精准定位令牌级秘密，并借助值-梯度解耦技术隐蔽注入攻击梯度，克服梯度淹没问题，强制模型记忆敏感信息。此外，我们首次实现了攻击者可验证的秘密窃取，仅通过黑盒查询即可精确区分真实泄露与幻觉。实验表明，我们的方法在不损害主任务性能的前提下，严格准确率（Strict ASR）超过98%，且能有效绕过包括DP-SGD、语义审计和代码审计在内的多种防御措施。

title: Unsafe and Unused? A History of Utility Code in Mature Open Source Projects
authors: Brandon Keller, Kaitlin Yandik, Angela Ngo, Andy Meneely
abstract: Filenames are a concise means of conveying information about source code to fellow developers. One such convention is util. Commonly understood to stand for "utility", filenames with the letters util are often an indication that the file contains code that may be broadly useful or reusable. Some projects use this convention heavily, for example, the Apache Tomcat server contains 925 files with util in the path name, which is 17.9% of all source code files in the tree. While the intent of the name may be to prevent duplicate code and reduce workload, what actually happens to util code over time? Do projects move away from util code as they mature? Are util files being used by fellow colleagues, or maintained and used by their author? The goal of our work is to help developers avoid creating unsafe and unused util files when developing their projects. We conducted a longitudinal mining study of the Git repositories of seven open source projects that have a long development history (Linux kernel, Django, FFmpeg, httpd, Struts, systemd, Tomcat). We analyzed how util usage, complexity, developer collaboration, and security are potentially correlated within these projects. Our longitudinal analysis was measured at 30-day intervals throughout the entire history of each project, resulting in 1773 snapshots over 147 project-years of development. We conducted rename tracking at every 30-day snapshot to examine util files over their entire lifetime in a codebase. For example, we found that a util file can be as much as 2.75 times more likely to be involved in a vulnerability than non-util files. While every project can adopt their own naming conventions, the ubiquity and longevity of util files shows a broader developer intent that is useful for understanding the socio-technical nature of software development.
title_zh: 不安全且未使用？成熟开源项目中实用代码的历史
abstract_zh:
文件名是一种向其他开发人员简洁传达源代码信息的有效方式。其中一种常见约定是使用“util”这一命名。人们普遍认为，“util”代表“utility”（实用工具），因此包含“util”字样的文件名通常表明该文件中包含的代码具有广泛的适用性或可重用性。一些项目大量采用这种命名规范，例如，Apache Tomcat 服务器中有 925 个文件路径包含“util”，占其整个代码库中所有源代码文件的 17.9%。虽然这种命名初衷是为了避免代码重复、减轻工作负担，但随着时间推移，这些 util 代码的实际状况如何？随着项目成熟，开发者是否会逐渐减少对 util 代码的依赖？这些 util 文件是否被其他同事使用，还是仅由其作者维护和使用？我们研究的目标是帮助开发人员在项目开发过程中避免创建不安全且无人使用的 util 文件。

为此，我们对七个具有长期开发历史的开源项目（Linux 内核、Django、FFmpeg、httpd、Struts、systemd、Tomcat）的 Git 仓库进行了纵向挖掘研究。我们分析了这些项目中 util 代码的使用情况、复杂度、开发者协作以及安全性之间可能存在的关联。我们的纵向分析以每 30 天为一个时间间隔，贯穿每个项目的整个生命周期，共生成了 1773 个快照，覆盖了总计 147 个项目的年度开发历程。我们在每一个 30 天的快照点上进行重命名追踪，以考察 util 文件在其整个代码库生命周期中的演变过程。例如，我们发现，一个 util 文件发生漏洞的可能性，最高可达非 util 文件的 2.75 倍。

尽管每个项目可以自行制定命名规范，但 util 文件的普遍性和持久性反映出一种更广泛而深层的开发者意图，这有助于我们理解软件开发中的社会技术特性。

title: DEFault++: Automated Fault Detection, Categorization, and Diagnosis for Transformer Architectures
authors: Sigma Jahan, Saurabh Singh Rajput, Tushar Sharma, Mohammad Masudur Rahman
abstract: Transformer models are widely deployed in critical AI applications, yet faults in their attention mechanisms, projections, and other internal components often degrade behavior silently without raising runtime errors. Existing fault diagnosis techniques often target generic deep neural networks and cannot identify which transformer component is responsible for an observed symptom. In this article, we present DEFault++, a hierarchical learning-based diagnostic technique that operates at three level of abstraction: it detects whether a fault is present, classifies it into one of 12 transformer-specific fault categories (covering both attention-internal mechanisms and surrounding architectural components), and identifies the underlying root cause from up to 45 mechanisms. To facilitate both training and evaluation, we construct DEFault-bench, a benchmark of 3,739 labeled instances obtained through systematic mutation testing. These instances are created across seven transformer models and nine downstream tasks using DEForm, a transformer-specific mutation technique we developed for this purpose. DEFault++ measures runtime behavior at the level of individual transformer components. It organizes these measurements through a Fault Propagation Graph (FPG) derived from the transformer architecture. It then produces an interpretable diagnosis using prototype matching combined with supervised contrastive learning. On DEFault-bench, DEFault++ exceeds an AUROC of 0.96 for detection and a Macro-F1 of 0.85 for both categorization and root-cause diagnosis on encoder and decoder architectures. In a developer study with 21 practitioners, the accuracy of choosing correct repair actions increased from 57.1% without support to 83.3% when using DEFault++.
title_zh: DEFault++：面向Transformer架构的自动化故障检测、分类与诊断
abstract_zh: Transformer模型被广泛应用于关键的AI应用中，然而其注意力机制、投影层及其他内部组件中的故障常常在不引发运行时错误的情况下悄然降低系统行为表现。现有的故障诊断技术多针对通用深度神经网络，无法准确识别导致特定症状的具体Transformer组件。本文提出DEFault++，一种分层学习型诊断方法，可在三个抽象层次上运作：首先检测是否存在故障；其次将故障分类为12种特定于Transformer的故障类别（涵盖注意力机制内部及周边架构组件）；最后从多达45种潜在机制中定位根本原因。为支持训练与评估，我们构建了DEFault-bench——一个包含3,739个标注实例的基准数据集，这些实例通过系统化的变异测试获得。所有实例均基于七种Transformer模型和九类下游任务，利用我们专为该研究开发的Transformer专用变异技术DEForm生成。DEFault++以单个Transformer组件为粒度测量运行时行为，并通过从Transformer架构中提取的故障传播图（Fault Propagation Graph, FPG）组织这些测量结果。随后，它结合原型匹配与监督对比学习，生成可解释的诊断结论。在DEFault-bench上，DEFault++在故障检测任务中的AUROC超过0.96，在编码器与解码器架构上的分类与根因诊断任务中，Macro-F1均达到0.85。在一项包含21名开发者的实证研究中，使用DEFault++后，选择正确修复措施的准确率从无辅助时的57.1%提升至83.3%。

title: Diagnosing Capability Gaps in Fine-Tuning Data
authors: Saeid Asgari Taghanaki, Rakshanda Agarwal, Bruce Sun, Rohan Jha, Elias Stengel-Eskin, Sara Malvar, Rui Ying, Yifei Xu, Guilherme Potje, Tusher Chakraborty, Leonardo de Oliveira Nunes, Ranveer Chandra, Emre Kiciman
abstract: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) for domain-specific tasks requires training datasets that comprehensively cover the target capabilities a practitioner needs. Yet identifying which capabilities a dataset fails to support, and doing so before an expensive fine-tuning run, remains a largely unsolved problem. We introduce GoalCover, a framework that helps practitioners systematically detect capability gaps in fine-tuning datasets through interactive goal decomposition and automated coverage assessment. GoalCover guides a practitioner through structured decomposition of a high-level goal into atomic, independently evaluable subgoals; assigns each training sample an LLM-based alignment score against every subgoal; and surfaces missing capabilities through automated analysis of low-scoring sample explanations. We validate the framework along two complementary axes. First, through controlled corruption experiments across three domains (medical QA, legal summarization, code generation), we show that GoalCover reliably distinguishes targeted from non-targeted capability impacts: target subgoals degrade by 25.6% on average versus 2.1% for non-target subgoals (Cohen's d=1.24). Second, we demonstrate downstream utility on a financial-summarization Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (RFT) task with Qwen-3-14B: training on GoalCover-filtered data improves the LLM-judge reward from 3.77 to 4.12 (out of 5) over the unfiltered baseline, and combining filtered data with goal-conditioned synthetic samples yields the strongest result (4.20). The two results together show that GoalCover works as a practical pre-fine-tuning diagnostic: it detects capability gaps and produces concrete signal for closing them.
title_zh: 微调数据中的能力差距诊断
abstract_zh: 微调大型语言模型（LLM）以适应特定领域任务，需要训练数据集全面覆盖实践者所需的目标能力。然而，在昂贵的微调训练开始之前，识别数据集未能支持哪些能力，仍是一个尚未解决的重大难题。我们提出了GoalCover框架，帮助实践者通过交互式目标分解与自动化覆盖率评估，系统性地发现微调数据集中的能力缺口。GoalCover引导用户将高层次目标逐步分解为可独立评估的原子子目标；为每个训练样本计算其与各个子目标之间的基于大模型的对齐得分；并通过分析得分较低样本的解释，自动揭示缺失的能力。我们在两个互补维度上验证了该框架的有效性：首先，在医疗问答、法律摘要和代码生成三个领域进行受控破坏实验，结果表明GoalCover能可靠地区分目标能力影响与非目标影响——目标子目标平均下降25.6%，而非目标子目标仅下降2.1%（Cohen's d = 1.24）。其次，我们在金融摘要强化微调（RFT）任务中展示了其下游实用性，使用Qwen-3-14B模型进行训练：基于GoalCover筛选后的数据，模型在LLM评分器上的奖励分数从原始基线的3.77提升至4.12（满分5分），而将筛选后的数据与目标条件生成的合成样本结合，取得了最佳效果（4.20）。两项结果共同证明，GoalCover作为一种实用的微调前诊断工具，不仅能有效检测能力缺口，还能提供明确信号以指导弥补这些缺陷。

title: RCW-CIM: A Digital CIM-based LLM Accelerator with Read-Compute/Write
authors: Yan-Cheng Guo, Tian-Sheuan Chang, Jian-Wei Su
abstract: Digital computing-in-memory (DCIM) has emerged as a promising solution for large language model (LLM) acceleration by minimizing data transfers between external DRAM and on-chip accelerators while maintaining high precision for superior accuracy. However, existing CIM architectures often overlook weight update latency, which becomes critical as LLM weights are far larger than a single CIM macro capacity. To address this issue, this paper proposes a read-compute/write (RCW) architecture that effectively minimizes weight update latency, along with a nonlinear operator fusion that further mitigates dependencyinduced latency. The proposed RCW reduces decoding computing latency by 21.59% on the Llama2-7B model. In addition, the nonlinear operator fusion mechanism achieves a 69.17% latency reduction through efficient partial accumulation and group-based approximation. Furthermore, a weight-stationary and output column stationary (WS-OCS) dataflow is introduced to reduce both external DRAM access and internal CIM weight updates by 51.6% and 87.6% respectively during the prefill phase of 1024 tokens, leading to an overall 49.76% latency reduction. Fabricated using TSMC 22 nm CMOS technology and operating at 100 MHz, the proposed RCW-CIM achieves 3.28 TOPS and 42.3 TOPS/W, enabling 4.2 ms prefill latency and 26.87 decoded tokens per second for the INT4-weight Llama2 model with dual DDR5-6400 memory.
title_zh: RCW-CIM：一种基于数字CIM的LLM加速器，支持读取-计算/写入操作
abstract_zh: 数字计算内存（DCIM）作为一种有前景的解决方案，通过减少外部DRAM与片上加速器之间的数据传输，在保持高精度以实现优异准确率的同时，有效加速了大语言模型（LLM）的运行。然而，现有的计算内存（CIM）架构往往忽视了权重更新延迟问题，而这一问题在LLM权重远超单个CIM宏单元容量时变得尤为关键。为解决该问题，本文提出了一种读-计算-写（RCW）架构，可有效降低权重更新延迟，并结合非线性算子融合机制，进一步缓解依赖关系引发的延迟。所提出的RCW架构在Llama2-7B模型上将解码计算延迟降低了21.59%。此外，非线性算子融合机制通过高效的局部累加和基于分组的近似方法，实现了69.17%的延迟降低。同时，本文引入了一种权重静态、输出列静态（WS-OCS）的数据流方案，在1024个token的预填充阶段，分别将外部DRAM访问和内部CIM权重更新减少了51.6%和87.6%，整体延迟降低达49.76%。采用TSMC 22 nm CMOS工艺制造，工作频率为100 MHz，所提出的RCW-CIM架构实现了3.28 TOPS的算力和42.3 TOPS/W的能效，支持INT4权重的Llama2模型实现4.2 ms的预填充延迟和每秒26.87个解码token的性能，配备双DDR5-6400内存。

title: Heterogeneous Scientific Foundation Model Collaboration
authors: Zihao Li, Jiaru Zou, Feihao Fang, Xuying Ning, Mengting Ai, Tianxin Wei, Sirui Chen, Xiyuan Yang, Jingrui He
abstract: Agentic large language model systems have demonstrated strong capabilities. However, their reliance on language as the universal interface fundamentally limits their applicability to many real-world problems, especially in scientific domains where domain-specific foundation models have been developed to address specialized tasks beyond natural language. In this work, we introduce Eywa, a heterogeneous agentic framework designed to extend language-centric systems to a broader class of scientific foundation models. The key idea of Eywa is to augment domain-specific foundation models with a language-model-based reasoning interface, enabling language models to guide inference over non-linguistic data modalities. This design allows predictive foundation models, which are typically optimized for specialized data and tasks, to participate in higher-level reasoning and decision-making processes within agentic systems. Eywa can serve as a drop-in replacement for a single-agent pipeline (EywaAgent) or be integrated into existing multi-agent systems by replacing traditional agents with specialized agents (EywaMAS). We further investigate a planning-based orchestration framework in which a planner dynamically coordinates traditional agents and Eywa agents to solve complex tasks across heterogeneous data modalities (EywaOrchestra). We evaluate Eywa across a diverse set of scientific domains spanning physical, life, and social sciences. Experimental results demonstrate that Eywa improves performance on tasks involving structured and domain-specific data, while reducing reliance on language-based reasoning through effective collaboration with specialized foundation models.
title_zh: 异构科学基础模型协作
abstract_zh: 代理型大语言模型系统已展现出强大的能力。然而，其对语言作为通用接口的依赖从根本上限制了其在许多现实问题中的应用，尤其是在科学领域，那里已开发出特定领域的基础模型来处理超越自然语言的专门任务。在本工作中，我们提出了Eywa——一种异构代理框架，旨在将以语言为中心的系统扩展至更广泛的科学基础模型。Eywa的核心思想是为特定领域基础模型配备基于语言模型的推理接口，使语言模型能够指导非语言数据模态上的推理。这一设计使得通常针对特定数据和任务优化的预测性基础模型，能够参与代理系统中更高层次的推理与决策过程。Eywa可作为单代理流程的即插即用替代方案（EywaAgent），也可通过将传统代理替换为专业代理（EywaMAS）集成到现有的多代理系统中。此外，我们还研究了一种基于规划的协调框架，其中规划器动态协调传统代理与Eywa代理，以解决跨异构数据模态的复杂任务（EywaOrchestra）。我们在涵盖物理、生命和社会科学等多个科学领域的多样化场景中评估了Eywa的表现。实验结果表明，Eywa在涉及结构化和领域特定数据的任务中提升了性能，同时通过与专业基础模型的有效协作，显著降低了对基于语言的推理的依赖。

title: Cost-Aware Learning
authors: Clara Mohri, Amir Globerson, Haim Kaplan, Tomer Koren, Yishay Mansour
abstract: We consider the problem of Cost-Aware Learning, where sampling different component functions of a finite-sum objective incurs different costs. The objective is to reach a target error while minimizing the total cost. First, we propose the Cost-Aware Stochastic Gradient Descent algorithm for convex functions, and derive its cost complexity to attain an error of $ε$. Furthermore, we establish a lower bound for this setting and provide a subset selection algorithm to further reduce the cost of training. We apply our theoretical insights to reinforcement learning with language models, where the computational cost of policy gradients varies with sequence length. To this end, we introduce Cost-Aware GRPO, an algorithm designed to reduce the cost of policy optimization while preserving performance. Empirical results on 1.5B and 8B LLMs demonstrate that our approach reduces the tokens used in policy optimization by up to about 30% while matching or exceeding baseline accuracy.
title_zh: 成本感知学习
abstract_zh: 我们研究的是成本感知学习（Cost-Aware Learning）问题，其中对有限求和目标函数的不同分量函数进行采样会带来不同的成本。目标是在达到指定误差水平的同时最小化总成本。首先，我们提出了针对凸函数的**成本感知随机梯度下降算法**（Cost-Aware Stochastic Gradient Descent），并推导出其在达到误差 $ε$ 时的成本复杂度。此外，我们建立了该设置下的理论下界，并提出了一种子集选择算法，以进一步降低训练成本。我们将这些理论洞见应用于基于语言模型的强化学习场景，其中策略梯度的计算成本随序列长度变化而变化。为此，我们引入了**成本感知GRPO**（Cost-Aware GRPO）算法，旨在降低策略优化过程中的成本，同时保持性能。在15亿（1.5B）和80亿（8B）参数的大规模语言模型上的实验结果表明，我们的方法在保持或超越基线准确率的前提下，将策略优化中使用的token数量减少了约30%。

title: Exploring Interaction Paradigms for LLM Agents in Scientific Visualization
authors: Jackson Vonderhorst, Kuangshi Ai, Haichao Miao, Shusen Liu, Chaoli Wang
abstract: This paper examines how different types of large language model (LLM) agents perform on scientific visualization (SciVis) tasks, where users generate visualization workflows from natural-language instructions. We compare three primary interaction paradigms, including domain-specific agents with structured tool use, computer-use agents, and general-purpose coding agents, by evaluating eight representative agents across 15 benchmark tasks and measuring visualization quality, efficiency, robustness, and computational cost. We further analyze interaction modalities, including code scripts and model context protocol (MCP) or API calls for structured tool use, as well as command-line interfaces (CLI) and graphical user interfaces (GUI) for more general interaction, while additionally studying the effect of persistent memory in selected agents. The results reveal clear tradeoffs across paradigms and modalities. General-purpose coding agents achieve the highest task success rates but are computationally expensive, while domain-specific agents are more efficient and stable but less flexible. Computer-use agents perform well on individual steps but struggle with longer multi-step workflows, indicating that long-horizon planning is their primary limitation. Across both CLI- and GUI-based settings, persistent memory improves performance over repeated trials, although its benefits depend on the underlying interaction mode and the quality of feedback. These findings suggest that no single approach is sufficient, and future SciVis systems should combine structured tool use, interactive capabilities, and adaptive memory mechanisms to balance performance, robustness, and flexibility.
title_zh: 探索大语言模型智能体在科学可视化中的交互范式
abstract_zh: 本文研究了不同类型的大语言模型（LLM）代理在科学可视化（SciVis）任务中的表现，其中用户通过自然语言指令生成可视化工作流。我们通过评估8个代表性代理在15个基准任务上的表现，比较了三种主要交互范式：具有结构化工具使用的领域专用代理、计算机使用型代理以及通用编程代理，衡量其在可视化质量、效率、鲁棒性及计算成本方面的表现。此外，我们还分析了不同的交互模态，包括用于结构化工具使用的代码脚本、模型上下文协议（MCP）或API调用，以及更通用的命令行界面（CLI）和图形用户界面（GUI），同时研究了部分代理中持久记忆机制的影响。结果揭示了不同范式与模态之间存在明显的权衡。通用编程代理在任务成功率上表现最高，但计算成本较高；而领域专用代理则更为高效且稳定，但灵活性较差。计算机使用型代理在单步任务中表现良好，但在较长的多步骤工作流中表现不佳，表明其主要局限在于长程规划能力。无论是在CLI还是GUI环境下，持久记忆都能在多次重复试验中提升性能，但其优势取决于底层交互模式以及反馈质量。这些发现表明，单一方法不足以满足需求，未来的科学可视化系统应结合结构化工具使用、交互能力以及自适应记忆机制，以在性能、鲁棒性与灵活性之间取得平衡。

title: D3-Gym: Constructing Real-World Verifiable Environments for Data-Driven Discovery
authors: Hanane Nour Moussa, Yifei Li, Zhuoyang Li, Yankai Yang, Cheng Tang, Tianshu Zhang, Nesreen K. Ahmed, Ali Payani, Ziru Chen, Huan Sun
abstract: Despite recent progress in language models and agents for scientific data-driven discovery, further advancing their capabilities is held back by the absence of verifiable environments representing real-world scientific tasks.To fill this gap, we introduce D3-Gym, the first automatically constructed dataset with verifiable environments for scientific Data-Driven Discovery. D3-Gym comprises (1) 565 tasks sourced from 239 real scientific repositories across four disciplines where (2) each task is equipped with a natural language instruction, an executable environment with pre-installed dependencies, input dataset and artifact previews, a reference code solution, and an automatically synthesized evaluation script. Rigorous evaluation of the quality of the verification signal in D3-Gym confirms that our evaluation scripts achieve 87.5% agreement with human-annotated gold standards and strong alignment in domain-specific evaluation logic, showing their scientific soundness. Further, training on trajectories sampled from D3-Gym yields consistent and substantial gains across Qwen3 models of varying sizes on ScienceAgentBench, boosting Qwen3-32B by 7.8 absolute points and substantially shrinking the gap with strong proprietary models. All D3-Gym artifacts (environments, creation workflow, trajectories, and models) can be found at https://github.com/OSU-NLP-Group/D3-Gym.
title_zh: D3-Gym：用于数据驱动发现的真实世界可验证环境构建
abstract_zh: 尽管语言模型和智能体在科学数据驱动发现领域取得了近期进展，但其能力的进一步提升仍受限于缺乏可验证的真实世界科学任务环境。为填补这一空白，我们提出了D3-Gym——首个自动构建的、具备可验证环境的科学数据驱动发现数据集。D3-Gym包含：（1）来自四个学科领域共239个真实科学代码库的565项任务；（2）每项任务均配备自然语言指令、可执行环境（含预安装依赖）、输入数据集与成果预览、参考代码解决方案，以及自动生成的评估脚本。对D3-Gym中验证信号质量的严格评估表明，我们的评估脚本与人工标注的黄金标准达成87.5%的一致性，并在特定领域评估逻辑上表现出高度一致性，充分证明了其科学合理性。此外，在D3-Gym采样轨迹上进行训练，使不同规模的Qwen3模型在ScienceAgentBench基准测试中均获得持续且显著的性能提升，其中Qwen3-32B模型绝对得分提升7.8分，显著缩小了与领先专有模型之间的差距。D3-Gym的所有相关资源（环境、创建流程、轨迹及模型）均可在 https://github.com/OSU-NLP-Group/D3-Gym 获取。

title: An Empirical Evaluation of Code Smell Detection in Angular Applications
authors: Maykon Nunes, Emanuel Coutinho, Carla Bezerra, Ivan Machado
abstract: Angular is one of the most widely adopted frameworks for developing large-scale, dynamic web applications. As projects increase in scope and complexity, developers face growing challenges in managing architecture and maintaining clean, modular code. These challenges often lead to design flaws, commonly referred to as code smells. While React-specific smells have been cataloged in prior studies, limited knowledge exists regarding Angular-specific smells and how they manifest. This study investigates Angular code smells through a grey literature review, consolidating community knowledge and technical discussions. From the collected sources, 11 distinct Angular code smells were identified, 6 of which also occur in React-based systems, suggesting that some issues are cross-framework. Each smell was analyzed, exemplified, and grouped according to its technical characteristics. Based on the resulting catalog, we implemented an automated static analysis tool to detect Angular code smells. The tool was empirically evaluated using a manually validated dataset, and its effectiveness was assessed through standard information retrieval metrics. The evaluation results indicate high detection performance across all smells, achieving accuracy values above 0.88 and F1-scores ranging from 0.89 to 1.00. The findings reveal recurring issues such as component overloading, duplicated logic, and inefficient template bindings, reinforcing the relevance of systematic detection support. This study presents the first catalog of Angular-specific code smells derived from grey literature and demonstrates the feasibility and effectiveness of automated detection, providing a solid foundation for future empirical studies and tool development aimed at improving front-end code quality.
title_zh: Angular应用程序中代码异味检测的实证评估
abstract_zh: Angular 是开发大规模、动态 Web 应用程序最广泛采用的框架之一。随着项目规模和复杂性的不断增加，开发者在架构管理以及保持代码清晰、模块化方面面临日益严峻的挑战。这些挑战常常导致设计缺陷，即所谓的“代码异味”（code smells）。尽管此前已有研究对 React 框架中的代码异味进行了系统整理，但关于 Angular 特有的代码异味及其具体表现形式，目前仍缺乏充分的认知。本研究通过灰度文献综述的方法，整合了社区知识与技术讨论，深入探究了 Angular 中的代码异味。从收集的资料中，共识别出 11 种不同的 Angular 代码异味，其中 6 种也存在于基于 React 的系统中，表明部分问题具有跨框架的普遍性。每种异味均被详细分析、举例说明，并根据其技术特征进行分类。基于该分类目录，我们开发了一款自动化静态分析工具，用于检测 Angular 代码异味。该工具通过一个经过人工验证的数据集进行了实证评估，并采用标准的信息检索指标衡量其性能。评估结果表明，该工具在所有异味类型上均表现出优异的检测能力，准确率均超过 0.88，F1 分数介于 0.89 到 1.00 之间。研究发现，诸如组件过度负载、逻辑重复以及模板绑定效率低下等常见问题反复出现，进一步凸显了系统化检测支持的重要性。本研究首次基于灰度文献构建了面向 Angular 的代码异味目录，证明了自动化检测的可行性和有效性，为未来针对前端代码质量提升的实证研究与工具开发奠定了坚实基础。

title: The Grand Software Supply Chain of AI Systems
authors: Carmine Cesarano, Martin Monperrus
abstract: AI systems rest on software with low integrity mechanisms, leaving AI systems exposed across every stage from data acquisition to final inference. This paper makes the AI supply chain a first-class object of analysis, decomposing it across four architectural layers: data acquisition, model training, model inference, and a cross-cutting substrate. Within these layers, we identify four structural gaps that traditional supply chain mechanisms do not address: verifiability, versioning, observability, and traceability.Current AI systems fall short on all of them: they carry undeclared behavioral couplings that no resolver enforces; they cannot be reverted back to known working assemblies; they degrade silently rather than surfacing breaking changes; and their lineage can hardly be approximated. To illustrate the scale of the software supply chain of AI, we measure a reference stack of 48 production-grade open-source projects, which declares 4,664 direct dependencies, resolves to 11,508 transitive packages, and totals roughly 392M lines of code.
title_zh: 人工智能系统的宏大软件供应链
abstract_zh: 人工智能系统依赖于完整性机制薄弱的软件，使其在从数据获取到最终推理的每一个阶段都面临暴露风险。本文首次将人工智能供应链作为核心分析对象，将其分解为四个架构层级：数据获取、模型训练、模型推理以及贯穿各层的基础支撑层。在这些层级中，我们识别出传统供应链机制未能解决的四个结构性缺陷：可验证性、版本管理、可观测性和可追溯性。当前的人工智能系统在所有这些方面均存在不足：它们包含未声明的行为耦合，且没有任何机制能够强制执行；无法回滚至已知正常运行的组件组合；出现退化时无声无息，而非显式报告破坏性变更；其来源链几乎无法近似还原。为了展示人工智能软件供应链的规模，我们对一个包含48个生产级开源项目的参考技术栈进行了测量，该栈声明了4,664个直接依赖项，解析后涉及11,508个传递依赖包，总计约3.92亿行代码。

title: ANCORA: Learning to Question via Manifold-Anchored Self-Play for Verifiable Reasoning
authors: Chengcao Yang, Jun Chen
abstract: We propose a paradigm shift from learning to answer to learning to question: can a language model generate verifiable problems, solve them, and turn the resulting feedback into self-improvement without human supervision? We introduce ANCORA, an anchored-curriculum framework in which a unified policy alternates between a Proposer that synthesizes novel specifications and a Solver that produces verified solutions. ANCORA rests on three load-bearing mechanisms: a two-level group-relative update that couples Proposer advantages across specifications with Solver advantages across solution attempts; iterative self-distilled SFT that projects the base model onto its valid-output manifold before RL; and a UCB-guided Curriculum DAG that grows only through strictly filtered, novel, Solver-verified specifications. These stabilizers are necessary because sparse verifier feedback otherwise drives Proposer collapse even under MLRL-aligned rewards. Instantiated in Verus, ANCORA lifts Dafny2Verus pass@1 from a 26.6% SFT baseline to 81.5% in the test-time-training setting under 0-shot evaluation, outperforming the PSV self-play baseline by 15.8 points despite PSV using 1-shot inference; in a separate transfer setting, training from Dafny2Verus seeds yields 36.2% and 17.2% pass@1 on held-out MBPP and HumanEval.
title_zh: ANCORA：通过流形锚定的自对弈学习质疑，实现可验证推理
abstract_zh: 我们提出一种范式转变：从“学习回答”转向“学习提问”——语言模型能否自主生成可验证的问题，自行求解，并将所得反馈转化为无需人工监督的自我改进？为此，我们引入ANCORA，一种基于锚定课程（anchored-curriculum）的框架，其中统一策略在“命题者”（Proposer）与“求解者”（Solver）之间交替运行：“命题者”负责生成新颖的规范说明，“求解者”则产出经过验证的解决方案。ANCORA依托三大核心机制：两级相对更新机制，将不同规范下的命题者优势与不同求解尝试中的求解者优势相耦合；迭代自蒸馏的监督微调（SFT），在强化学习前将基础模型投影至其有效输出流形；以及基于UCB引导的课程有向无环图（Curriculum DAG），仅通过严格筛选、全新且经求解者验证的规范逐步扩展。这些稳定机制至关重要，因为稀疏的验证器反馈若无此保障，即便在MLRL对齐奖励下，仍会导致命题者崩溃。在Verus系统中实现后，ANCORA将Dafny2Verus任务在零样本评估下的测试时训练（test-time-training）pass@1指标从26.6%的SFT基线提升至81.5%，超越PSV自对弈基线15.8个百分点，尽管PSV采用的是单次推理（1-shot inference）；在另一项迁移设置中，基于Dafny2Verus种子进行训练，于保留的MBPP和HumanEval数据集上分别取得36.2%和17.2%的pass@1成绩。

title: HAVEN: Hybrid Automated Verification ENgine for UVM Testbench Synthesis with LLMs
authors: Chang-Chih Meng, Yu-Ren Lu, Guan-Yu Lin, Tsung Tai Yeh, Kai-Chiang Wu, I-Chen Wu
abstract: Integrated Circuit (IC) verification consumes nearly 70% of the IC development cycle, and recent research leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to automatically generate testbenches and reduce verification overhead. However, LLMs have difficulty generating testbenches correctly. Unlike high-level programming languages, Hardware Description Languages (HDLs) are extremely rare in LLMs training data, leading LLMs to produce incorrect code. To overcome challenges when using LLMs to generate Universal Verification Methodology (UVM) testbenches and sequences, wepropose HAVEN (Hybrid Automated Verification ENgine) to prevent LLMs from writing HDL directly. For UVM testbench generation, HAVEN utilizes LLM agents to analyze design specifications to produce a structured architectural plan. The HAVEN Template Engine then combines with predefined and protocol-specific templates to generate all UVM components with correct bus-handshake timing. For UVM sequence generation, HAVEN introduces a Protocol-Aware Sequence Domain-Specific Language (DSL) that decomposes sequences into fine-grained step types. A set of predefined DSL patterns first establishes sequences that achieve a high coverage rate without LLM involvement. HAVEN continues to improve the coverage rate by iteratively leveraging LLM agents to analyze coverage gap reports and compose additional targeted DSL sequences. Unlike previous works, HAVEN is the first system that utilizes pre-defined, protocol-specific Jinja2 templates to generate all UVM components and UVM sequences using our proposed Protocol-Aware DSL and rule-based code generator. Our experimental results on 19 open-source IP designs spanning three interface protocols (Direct, Wishbone, AXI4-Lite) show that HAVEN achieves 100% compilation success, 90.6% code coverage, and 87.9% functional coverage on average, and is SOTA among LLM-assisted testbench generation systems.
title_zh: HAVEN：基于大语言模型的UVM测试平台合成混合自动化验证引擎
abstract_zh:
集成电路（IC）验证占整个IC开发周期的近70%，近年来的研究利用大型语言模型（LLMs）自动生成功能测试平台，以降低验证开销。然而，LLMs在生成正确测试平台方面存在困难。与高级编程语言不同，硬件描述语言（HDL）在LLM训练数据中极为罕见，导致LLM生成的代码常出现错误。为克服使用LLM生成通用验证方法（UVM）测试平台和序列时面临的挑战，我们提出了HAVEN（混合自动化验证引擎），通过避免LLM直接编写HDL代码来提升生成质量。

在UVM测试平台生成方面，HAVEN利用LLM代理分析设计规格，生成结构化的架构方案；随后，HAVEN模板引擎结合预定义的、协议相关的模板，自动生成所有符合正确总线握手时序的UVM组件。在UVM序列生成方面，HAVEN引入了一种协议感知的序列领域特定语言（DSL），将测试序列分解为细粒度的步骤类型。首先，一组预定义的DSL模式在无需LLM参与的情况下构建出高覆盖率的初始序列；随后，HAVEN通过迭代调用LLM代理分析覆盖率缺口报告，并组合生成针对性更强的DSL序列，持续提升覆盖率。

与以往工作不同，HAVEN是首个采用预定义、协议相关的Jinja2模板，结合我们提出的协议感知DSL和基于规则的代码生成器，实现UVM组件和UVM序列全自动生成的系统。我们在涵盖三种接口协议（Direct、Wishbone、AXI4-Lite）的19个开源IP设计上进行了实验，结果表明：HAVEN实现了平均100%的编译成功率、90.6%的代码覆盖率和87.9%的功能覆盖率，在所有基于LLM的测试平台生成系统中处于领先水平（SOTA）。

title: Belief-Guided Inference Control for Large Language Model Services via Verifiable Observations
authors: Wenhao Yuan, Chenchen Lin, Jian Chen, Jinfeng Xu, Shuo Yang, Edith Cheuk Han Ngai
abstract: In black-box large language model (LLM) services, response reliability is often only partially observable at decision time, while stronger inference pathways incur substantial computational cost, inducing a budgeted sequential decision problem: for each request, the system should decide whether the default low-cost response is sufficiently reliable or whether additional computation should be allocated to improve response quality. In this paper, we propose \textbf{Ver}ifiable \textbf{O}bservations for Risk-aware \textbf{I}nference \textbf{C}ontrol (\textsc{Veroic}), a framework for adaptive inference control in black-box LLM settings, which formulates request-time control as a \textit{partially observable Markov decision process} to capture partial observability and sequential budget coupling. It constructs a lightweight verifiable observation channel from the input-output pair by aggregating heterogeneous quality signals into a belief state over latent response reliability, which is then used by a budget-aware policy to decide whether to return the default output or trigger a higher-cost inference pathway. Experiments on diverse tasks show that \textsc{Veroic} achieves improved quality-cost trade-offs, stronger risk estimation and calibration, and more robust long-horizon inference control than competitive baselines.
title_zh: 通过可验证观测实现大型语言模型服务中的信念引导推理控制
abstract_zh: 在黑箱大语言模型（LLM）服务中，响应的可靠性通常在决策时刻仅能部分观测，而采用更强的推理路径则会带来显著的计算开销，从而形成一个受预算约束的序列决策问题：对于每个请求，系统需决定默认的低成本响应是否已足够可靠，或是否应分配额外计算资源以提升响应质量。本文提出了一种名为 \textbf{Ver}ifiable \textbf{O}bservations for Risk-aware \textbf{I}nference \textbf{C}ontrol（\textsc{Veroic}）的框架，用于黑箱LLM环境下的自适应推理控制。该框架将请求时的控制问题建模为一个 \textit{部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程}，以捕捉部分可观测性与序列预算耦合的特性。它通过聚合异构的质量信号，从输入-输出对中构建一个轻量级的可验证观测通道，形成关于潜在响应可靠性的信念状态；随后，由一个考虑预算的策略根据该信念状态决定是直接返回默认输出，还是触发更高成本的推理路径。在多种任务上的实验表明，\textsc{Veroic} 在质量-成本权衡、风险估计与校准能力，以及更鲁棒的长周期推理控制方面，均优于现有竞争基线方法。

title: Skills-Coach: A Self-Evolving Skill Optimizer via Training-Free GRPO
authors: Yu Tian, Jiawei Chen, Lifan Zheng, Mingxiang Tao, Xinyi Zeng, Zhaoxia Yin, Hang Su, Xian Sun
abstract: We introduce Skills-Coach, a novel automated framework designed to significantly enhance the self-evolution of skills within Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents. Addressing the current fragmentation of the skill ecosystem, Skills-Coach explores the boundaries of skill capabilities, thereby facilitating the comprehensive competency coverage essential for intelligent applications. The framework comprises four core modules: a Diverse Task Generation Module that systematically creates a comprehensive test suite for various skills; a Lightweight Optimization Module dedicated to optimizing skill prompts and their corresponding code; a Comparative Execution Module facilitating the execution and evaluation of both original and optimized skills; and a Traceable Evaluation Module, which rigorously evaluates performance against specified criteria. Skills-Coach offers flexible execution options through its virtual and real modes. To validate its efficacy, we introduce Skill-X, a comprehensive benchmark dataset consisting of 48 diverse skills. Experimental results demonstrate that Skills-Coach achieves significant performance improvements in skill capability across a wide range of categories, highlighting its potential to advance the development of more robust and adaptable LLM-based agents.
title_zh: 技能教练：一种无需训练的GRPO自演化技能优化器
abstract_zh: 我们提出Skills-Coach，一种新颖的自动化框架，旨在显著提升基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能体在技能自我进化方面的表现。针对当前技能生态系统的碎片化问题，Skills-Coach通过探索技能能力的边界，推动实现智能应用所必需的全面能力覆盖。该框架包含四个核心模块：多样任务生成模块，系统性地构建涵盖各类技能的完整测试套件；轻量级优化模块，专注于优化技能提示词及其对应代码；对比执行模块，支持对原始技能与优化后技能的执行与评估；可追溯评估模块，严格依据预设标准对性能进行评价。Skills-Coach提供虚拟模式与真实模式两种灵活的执行方式。为验证其有效性，我们引入了Skill-X——一个包含48种多样化技能的综合性基准数据集。实验结果表明，Skills-Coach在多个类别中均显著提升了技能能力表现，充分展现了其在推动更强大、更适应性强的LLM智能体发展方面的巨大潜力。

title: ScaleBox: Enabling High-Fidelity and Scalable Code Verification for Large Language Models
authors: Jiasheng Zheng, Xin Zheng, Boxi Cao, Pengbo Wang, Zhengzhao Ma, Qiming Zhu, Jiazhen Jiang, Yaojie Lu, Hongyu Lin, Xianpei Han, Le Sun
abstract: Code sandboxes have emerged as a critical infrastructure for advancing the coding capabilities of large language models, providing verifiable feedback for both RL training and evaluation. However, existing systems fail to provide accurate verification and efficiency under high-concurrency workloads. We present ScaleBox, a high-fidelity and scalable system designed to address these limitations in large-scale code training. ScaleBox introduces automated special-judge generation and management, fine-grained parallel execution across test cases with seamless multi-node coordination, and a configuration-driven evaluation suite for reproducible benchmarking. A series of experiments demonstrates that ScaleBox significantly enhances code verification accuracy and efficiency. Our further RLVR experiments show that ScaleBox substantially improves both performance on LiveCodeBench and training stability, significantly outperforming heuristic-matching baselines. By providing a reliable and high-throughput infrastructure, ScaleBox facilitates more effective research and development in large-scale code training.
title_zh: ScaleBox：实现大语言模型高保真且可扩展的代码验证
abstract_zh: 代码沙箱已成为提升大型语言模型编码能力的关键基础设施，为强化学习（RL）训练与评估提供了可验证的反馈。然而，现有系统在高并发工作负载下难以兼顾验证准确性与执行效率。本文提出 ScaleBox，一个高保真且可扩展的系统，旨在解决大规模代码训练中的上述局限性。ScaleBox 引入了自动化特殊评测器生成与管理机制，支持测试用例间的细粒度并行执行，并实现无缝的多节点协同调度；同时，通过配置驱动的评估套件，确保基准测试的可复现性。一系列实验表明，ScaleBox 显著提升了代码验证的准确率与执行效率。进一步的 RLVR 实验显示，ScaleBox 不仅显著提升了模型在 LiveCodeBench 上的表现，还增强了训练过程的稳定性，远超基于启发式匹配的基线方法。通过提供可靠且高吞吐的基础设施，ScaleBox 有力推动了大规模代码训练领域的研究与开发。

title: InteractWeb-Bench: Can Multimodal Agent Escape Blind Execution in Interactive Website Generation?
authors: Qiyao Wang, Haoran Hu, Longze Chen, Hongbo Wang, Hamid Alinejad-Rokny, Yuan Lin, Min Yang
abstract: With the advancement of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) and coding agents, the website development has shifted from manual programming to agent-based project-level code synthesis. Existing benchmarks rely on idealized assumptions, especially for well-structured, information-rich inputs and static execution settings. In contrast, real-world development is constrained by a critical bottleneck: the semantic misalignment between ambiguous, low-quality instructions from non-expert users and model understanding, which results in a failure mode that we term blind execution. To address this gap, we introduce InteractWeb-Bench, the first multimodal interactive benchmark for website generation under non-expert low-code user conditions. InteractWeb-Bench introduces four types of user agents and persona-driven instruction perturbations to systematically simulate diverse user behaviors, including ambiguity, redundancy, and contradiction, grounded in requirement engineering defect taxonomies. We develop an interactive execution environment for agents, featuring a unified action space comprising Clarify, Implement, Verify, and Submit, enabling iterative intent refinement, code synthesis, and visual feedback-based validation. Extensive experiments and analysis reveal that frontier MLLM-based agents remain trapped in blind execution, exposing limitations in intent recognition and adaptive interaction.
title_zh: InteractWeb-Bench：多模态智能体能否在交互式网站生成中摆脱盲目执行？
abstract_zh: 随着多模态大语言模型（MLLM）和代码代理的发展，网站开发已从传统的手动编程转向基于代理的项目级代码合成。现有的评估基准大多依赖理想化的假设，尤其是在结构良好、信息丰富的输入以及静态执行环境方面。然而，在真实世界开发中存在一个关键瓶颈：非专业用户提供的模糊、低质量指令与模型理解之间存在语义错位，导致一种我们称之为“盲执行”的失败模式。为弥合这一差距，我们提出了 InteractWeb-Bench，这是首个面向非专家低代码用户场景下网站生成的多模态交互式评估基准。InteractWeb-Bench 引入了四种类型的用户代理及基于角色驱动的指令扰动机制，系统性地模拟了多样化的用户行为，包括模糊性、冗余性和矛盾性，其设计基于需求工程缺陷分类体系。我们还构建了一个支持代理交互的执行环境，采用统一的动作空间（包含澄清 Clarify、实现 Implement、验证 Verify 和提交 Submit 四个动作），支持迭代式意图精炼、代码生成以及基于视觉反馈的验证。大量实验与分析表明，前沿的 MLLM 代理仍深陷于“盲执行”困境，暴露出其在意图识别与自适应交互方面的显著局限性。

title: Toward Autonomous SOC Operations: End-to-End LLM Framework for Threat Detection, Query Generation, and Resolution in Security Operations
authors: Md Hasan Saju, Akramul Azim
abstract: Security Operations Centers (SOCs) face mounting operational challenges. These challenges come from increasing threat volumes, heterogeneous SIEM platforms, and time-consuming manual triage workflows. We present an end-to-end threat management framework that integrates ensemble-based detection, syntax-constrained query generation, and retrieval-augmented resolution support to automate critical security workflows. Our detection module evaluates both traditional machine learning classifiers and large language models (LLMs), then combines the three best-performing LLMs to create an ensemble model, achieving 82.8% accuracy while maintaining 0.120 false positive rate on SIEM logs. We introduce the SQM (Syntax Query Metadata) architecture for automated evidence collection. It uses platform-specific syntax constraints, metadata-based retrieval, and documentation-grounded prompting to generate executable queries for IBM QRadar and Google SecOps. SQM achieves a BLEU score of 0.384 and a ROUGE-L score of 0.731. These results are more than twice as good as the baseline LLM performance. For incident resolution and recommendation generation, we demonstrate that integrating SQM-derived evidence improves resolution code prediction accuracy from 78.3% to 90.0%, with an overall recommendation quality score of 8.70. In production SOC environments, our framework reduces average incident triage time from hours to under 10 minutes. This work demonstrates that domain-constrained LLM architectures with retrieval augmentation can meet the strict reliability and efficiency requirements of operational security environments at scale.
title_zh: 迈向自主安全运营：面向威胁检测、查询生成与处置的端到端大语言模型框架
abstract_zh: 安全运营中心（SOC）正面临日益严峻的运营挑战。这些挑战主要源于威胁数量的持续增长、异构的SIEM平台，以及耗时的手动事件研判流程。本文提出了一种端到端的威胁管理框架，通过集成基于集成的学习检测、语法约束查询生成，以及检索增强的响应支持，实现关键安全工作流程的自动化。我们的检测模块评估了传统的机器学习分类器与大型语言模型（LLMs），并选取表现最佳的三款LLM构建集成模型，在SIEM日志上实现了82.8%的准确率，同时保持0.120的低误报率。我们提出了SQM（Syntax Query Metadata）架构，用于自动化证据收集。该架构利用平台特定的语法约束、基于元数据的检索，以及基于文档提示的方法，生成适用于IBM QRadar和Google SecOps的可执行查询，BLEU得分为0.384，ROUGE-L得分为0.731，性能远超基线LLM模型，提升幅度超过两倍。在事件处置与建议生成方面，我们证明了结合SQM生成的证据，可将代码修复预测准确率从78.3%提升至90.0%，整体建议质量得分达到8.70。在实际SOC环境中，本框架将平均事件研判时间从数小时缩短至10分钟以内。本研究表明，经过领域约束并结合检索增强的LLM架构，能够在大规模运营安全环境中满足严格的可靠性与效率要求。

title: REBENCH: A Procedural, Fair-by-Construction Benchmark for LLMs on Stripped-Binary Types and Names (Extended Version)
authors: Jun Yeon Won, Xin Jin, Shiqing Ma, Zhiqiang Lin
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in recent years, driving their adoption across a wide range of domains, including computer security. In reverse engineering, LLMs are increasingly applied to critical tasks such as function and variable name recovery and type inference. However, despite the rapid growth of research in this area, progress has been hindered by the absence of a standardized dataset. Existing studies rely on disparate datasets, preprocessing pipelines, and evaluation metrics, making fair comparisons between approaches difficult and obscuring a clear understanding of LLM capabilities in binary analysis. To address these challenges, we present REBench, a comprehensive benchmark dataset for evaluating LLMs on binary reverse engineering tasks. REBench consolidates a superset of existing datasets, comprising hundreds of millions of lines of source code and a diverse collection of binaries spanning multiple architectures and optimization levels. REBench adopts a knowledge-base-driven methodology that stores byte-level stack information to generate ground truth, ensuring that task difficulty is preserved while maintaining universal applicability. This design enables fair evaluation across tasks while avoiding simplifications that could bias results. As a use case, we apply REBench to measure the reverse engineering performance of LLMs and the result demonstrates difficulties in complex tasks.
title_zh: REBENCH：一种用于大语言模型在剥离二进制类型和名称任务上的程序化、构造公平的基准测试（扩展版）
abstract_zh: 近年来，大型语言模型（LLMs）取得了显著进展，推动了其在众多领域的广泛应用，包括计算机安全。在逆向工程领域，LLMs 被越来越多地应用于函数名、变量名恢复以及类型推断等关键任务。然而，尽管该领域的研究迅速发展，进展仍受到缺乏标准化数据集的制约。现有研究依赖于不同的数据集、预处理流程和评估指标，导致不同方法之间的公平比较困难，也模糊了人们对 LLM 在二进制分析中实际能力的清晰认知。为解决这些问题，我们提出了 REBench——一个用于评估 LLM 在二进制逆向工程任务中表现的综合性基准数据集。REBench 整合了现有数据集的超集，包含数亿行源代码以及涵盖多种架构和优化级别的多样化二进制文件。REBench 采用基于知识库的方法，通过存储字节级栈信息生成真实标签，确保任务难度得以保留的同时保持广泛适用性。这一设计使得各类任务间的评估更加公平，避免了因过度简化而带来的结果偏差。作为应用场景，我们利用 REBench 评估了 LLM 的逆向工程性能，结果表明在复杂任务中仍存在显著挑战。

title: What Makes a Good Terminal-Agent Benchmark Task: A Guideline for Adversarial, Difficult, and Legible Evaluation Design
authors: Ivan Bercovich
abstract: Terminal-agent benchmarks have become a primary signal for measuring the coding and system-administration capabilities of large language models. As the market for evaluation environments grows, so does the pressure to ship tasks quickly, often without thorough adversarial review of the verification logic. This paper is a guideline for writing good benchmark tasks, drawn from over a year of contributing to and reviewing tasks for Terminal Bench. Most people write benchmark tasks the way they write prompts. They shouldn't. A prompt is designed to help the agent succeed; a benchmark is designed to find out if it can. We argue that good tasks are adversarial, difficult, and legible, and that a large class of common failure modes -- AI-generated instructions, over-prescriptive specifications, clerical difficulty, oracle solutions that assume hidden knowledge, tests that validate the wrong things, and reward-hackable environments -- are predictable consequences of treating task authoring as prompt authoring. We catalog these failure modes, argue that real difficulty is conceptual rather than environmental, and discuss recent empirical evidence that over 15% of tasks in popular terminal-agent benchmarks are reward-hackable. We hope this serves as a useful reference for benchmark maintainers, task contributors, and researchers using benchmark scores as evidence.
title_zh: 什么样的终端代理基准任务才算优秀：对抗性、难度与可读性评估设计指南
abstract_zh: 终端代理基准测试已成为衡量大型语言模型在编程与系统管理能力方面表现的主要指标。随着评估环境市场的不断发展，任务交付速度的压力日益增加，常常导致对验证逻辑缺乏充分的对抗性审查。本文基于作者超过一年参与和评审 Terminal Bench 任务的经验，提供了一份撰写优质基准任务的指南。大多数人撰写基准任务的方式如同撰写提示（prompt），但这种做法是错误的：提示旨在帮助代理成功，而基准则旨在检验其是否真正具备能力。我们主张，优秀的任务应具备对抗性、挑战性与可读性；而大量常见的失败模式——如由AI生成的指令、过度具体的规范、琐碎的文书工作、依赖隐含知识的“预言”解法、验证错误内容的测试，以及可被奖励机制操纵的环境——都是将任务创作等同于提示创作所导致的可预测后果。本文系统地梳理了这些失败模式，论证真正的难度在于概念层面而非环境设置，同时讨论了近期实证研究发现，在主流终端代理基准中，超过15%的任务存在可被奖励机制操纵的问题。我们希望本文能为基准维护者、任务贡献者以及将基准得分作为证据的研究人员提供有价值的参考。

title: Akita: A High Usability Simulation Framework for Computer Architecture
authors: Sabila Al Jannat, Ying Li, Mengyang He, Xuzhong Wang, Huizhi Zhao, Jingxiang Sun, Daoxuan Xu, Enze Xu, Yifan Sun
abstract: Computer architecture simulation is essential for evaluating new designs without the need for costly tapeout. The community has developed dozens of valuable simulators that have enabled significant architectural advances. However, using and developing simulators remains a major barrier due to ad-hoc component interfaces, strict deployment requirements, the burden of managing performance optimizations like parallelization at the component level, and limited monitoring and visualization capabilities. The root cause of these limitations is the systematic neglect of user and developer experience in favor of technical functionality. We believe that only by separating technical concerns from user and developer experience concerns -- through a dedicated simulation engine decoupled from hardware models -- can the community overcome these fundamental obstacles and enable more productive architectural research. Akita embodies this philosophy as a dedicated simulation engine that cleanly separates infrastructure from architectural models. Smart Ticking and Availability Backpropagation let developers write simple cycle-based code while achieving event-driven performance. Parallel simulation happens transparently -- developers write single-threaded code while Akita handles multi-core execution. Akita's simple, uniform, yet powerful simulation tracing support enables real-time monitoring and post-simulation visualization. We demonstrate the flexibility of Akita through case studies, including the development of a trace-based DNN simulation and a RISC-V CPU simulation, showing how prioritizing developer experience accelerates architectural research.
title_zh: 秋田：一种面向计算机体系结构的高可用性仿真框架
abstract_zh: 计算机架构仿真对于在无需昂贵流片的情况下评估新设计至关重要。社区已开发出数十个有价值的仿真器，推动了架构领域的重大进展。然而，由于组件接口缺乏统一规范、部署要求严苛、需在组件层面自行管理诸如并行化等性能优化工作，以及监控和可视化功能有限，使用和开发仿真器仍面临巨大障碍。这些局限的根本原因在于，长期以来技术功能被置于用户与开发者体验之上，系统性地忽视了后者的实际需求。我们坚信，唯有通过将技术实现与用户体验分离开来——即构建一个与硬件模型解耦的专用仿真引擎——才能真正突破这些根本性障碍，从而提升架构研究的效率。Akita 正是这一理念的体现：它是一个专门的仿真引擎，清晰地将基础设施与架构模型分离。其智能时钟（Smart Ticking）与可用性反向传播（Availability Backpropagation）机制使开发者能够编写简洁的周期级代码，同时获得事件驱动的高性能表现。并行仿真对开发者完全透明：他们只需编写单线程代码，Akita 自动处理多核执行。Akita 提供简单、统一且功能强大的仿真追踪支持，可实现实时监控与仿真后的可视化分析。我们通过多个案例研究展示了 Akita 的灵活性，包括基于 trace 的深度神经网络仿真和 RISC-V CPU 仿真，充分证明了优先考虑开发者体验如何显著加速架构研究进程。

title: BoostLoRA: Growing Effective Rank by Boosting Adapters
authors: Raviteja Anantha, Nick Levato, Layne C. Price
abstract: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods face a tradeoff between adapter size and expressivity: ultra-low-parameter adapters are confined to fixed low-rank subspaces, capping performance even with extended training. We propose BoostLoRA, a gradient-boosting framework that overcomes this limit by iteratively training and merging minimal adapters on the examples the current model gets wrong. A ROTATE SVD basis strategy assigns each round to an orthogonal subspace, so cumulative effective rank grows linearly with the number of rounds while each adapter remains ultra-low-rank. After merging, adapters are discarded, leaving zero inference overhead. On Qwen2.5-3B, BoostLoRA reaches 89.1% on GSM8K and 68.8% on MATH-500, surpassing both the best single-shot ultra-low parameter adapter (TinyLoRA) and full fine-tuning; on code generation it reaches 57.2% on MBPP and 80.4% on HumanEval while full fine-tuning drops below the zero-shot baseline. We also demonstrate cross-architecture transfer on protein binding classification with ESM2-650M and cross-entropy training. BoostLoRA is, to our knowledge, the first PEFT method whose effective rank grows with training, separating per-round parameter cost from total representational capacity.
title_zh: BoostLoRA：通过增强适配器提升有效秩
abstract_zh: 参数高效微调（PEFT）方法在适配器大小与表达能力之间面临权衡：超低参数量的适配器受限于固定的低秩子空间，即使经过长时间训练，性能也受到上限制约。我们提出BoostLoRA，一种基于梯度提升的框架，通过在当前模型预测错误的样本上迭代训练并合并极小规模的适配器，突破了这一限制。该方法采用ROTATE SVD基底策略，使每一轮训练分配到正交子空间，从而在保持每个适配器超低秩的同时，使累积的有效秩随训练轮数线性增长。合并完成后，适配器被丢弃，推理时无额外开销。在Qwen2.5-3B模型上，BoostLoRA在GSM8K任务中达到89.1%的准确率，在MATH-500上达到68.8%，超越了最佳单次训练的超低参数适配器（TinyLoRA）以及全量微调；在代码生成任务中，其在MBPP上达到57.2%，在HumanEval上达到80.4%，而全量微调的表现反而低于零样本基线。我们还展示了在蛋白质结合分类任务中，利用ESM2-650M模型和交叉熵训练实现跨架构迁移的效果。据我们所知，BoostLoRA是首个在训练过程中有效秩持续增长的PEFT方法，成功将每轮参数成本与整体表征容量解耦。
